name: Kevin Faulconer
subject: Responsible law enforcement is KEY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
Instead of defunding the police, let’s try a different approach. Read more >>
Peter, Recent events across the country have spurred some serious conversations about law enforcement in America. It’s unfortunately obvious that there are gaps in our public safety, but there ARE solutions. _Defunding the police is not an option._ As the mayor of San Diego, I put commonsense measures in place to make sure that our community's police officers had the tools and resources they needed to do their jobs and keep San Diegans safe. I directed the use of body cameras to increase trust and accountability, and banned the use of the carotid restraint. We were on the forefront of implementing these measures, and now they’re in widespread use. Using the carotid restraint is now illegal in California. We made salaries competitive to retain good officers, and introduced policies to ensure that our men and women in uniform are all following procedures under strict penalty. **There is still a lot of work to do, but defunding the police is not the answer.** It’s a failed experiment that has only hurt the communities who have attempted it. _We need to work to build trust — not tear it down._ My record in San Diego speaks for itself. I have the experience needed to bring effective and responsible law enforcement to the whole state. I just need your help to get to the Governor’s Office.
Thanks for your support,
Kevin Faulconer
**P.S.** **If you agree that defunding the police is a bad idea that hurts communities, please[chip in what you can](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/984936112560aa5a/4e1a8b2520013e1cc3d6b838967d376c/34943) to my campaign today.** Together, we can focus on making things right, and restoring mutual respect between law enforcement and all Californians. [**SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/984936112560aa5a/2a45b0c38a5e97a5c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/984936112560aa5a/aacea06cc608a949c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/984936112560aa5a/ba5942ce00ab990ac3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/984936112560aa5a/314711723c4c3590c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

name: Secretary Mike Pompeo
subject: Taking back the House is my FIRST Priority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or
body:
It's absolutely necessary that EVERY patriot chip in to take back
the House and FIRE Pelosi, which is why I've authorized a 500%
matching opportunity for top conservative supporters ONLY.

Peter, it's Mike Pompeo.

Let me be clear: My MAIN priority right now is taking back the
House for Republicans and FIRING Nancy Pelosi once and for all.

Without a Republican-held Congress, we leave the door wide open
for the Radical Left to dominate Biden's agenda.

A Conservative Majority will bring back sanity and commonsense
solutions that our Nation desperately needs, but we cannot do it
without your help, Fellow Conservative. Will you commit to
joining me in our fight to take back the House TODAY?
(https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/pompeo-5x-matching-retake-majority/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210420_PSM-AR.101460_secretary-mike-pompeo_t1058565-573&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=PSM-AR.101460&utm_content=20210420_taking-back-the-house-is-my-first-priority)

500% Matching Activated

TAKE BACK THE HOUSE
(https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/pompeo-5x-matching-retake-majority/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210420_PSM-AR.101460_secretary-mike-pompeo_t1058565-573&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=PSM-AR.101460&utm_content=20210420_taking-back-the-house-is-my-first-priority)

Nancy Pelosi is hanging on to the smallest majority in Decades
and we're only FIVE seats away from taking back a Republican
majority in the House. We are SO close, Fellow Conservative!

It's absolutely necessary that EVERY patriot chip in to take back
the House and FIRE Pelosi, which is why I've authorized a 500%
matching opportunity for top conservative supporters ONLY.

Taking back a conservative majority in the House means:
1. An America FIRST foreign policy agenda that prioritizes our
nation's security above all else
2. A strong and well-trained American military capable of
protecting our beloved country
3. Fair trade policies that benefit OUR economy (not China's!),
protect our small businesses, and lower taxes for American
families

That's what's on the line right now -- and it's why we've
activated a 500% match on all contributions made before MIDNIGHT
tonight.

500% Matching Activated

name: Latinos for America First
subject: Thank YOU Volunteers for making Border Patrol Appreciation Successful
body:
Hello, Friends! Each of you should use whatever gift you have received to serve others, as faithful stewards of God’s grace in its various forms. (1
| |
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=326491.2023.1.1bbe8a3cf7de80aa4557f92ad2229869) |
---
Hello, Friends! Each of you should use whatever gift you have received to serve others, as faithful stewards of God’s grace in its various forms. (1 Peter 4:10) On behalf of our organization, we would like to extend our most sincere gratitude in thanking you for serving as a volunteer in our Border Patrol Appreciation Event this past week on April 14. Because of fine Patriots like you, we are able to carry out good works in various service projects which reflect the #AmericaFirst agenda. Our Border Patrol Appreciation event in the Rio Grande Valley served approximately seven hundred hot meals to border agents. Volunteers worked expeditiously and this service project was a huge success. Thank You So Much for being a part of it. We hope you will continue working with us on future endeavors that help promote conservative causes. Special Thanks to ALL those who donated for this event, we would not have been able to complete this mission if it was not for YOU! Sincerely, Latinos for Trump/Latinos for America First Bianca Gracia - President Maria Miller - National Coordinator Mayra Guttierrez - Texas State Director Rolando Rodriguez - Texas Asst. Director Malorie Lerma - Communications Director Maria Luthiger - South Texas Director Laura Kirby - Marketing Director Kristie Tertel - Press Secretary And from the rest of our Board of Directors!
---
Thank YOU from our Latinos for America First Family
* * *
---
|
---
| | [ DONATE TODAY ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=326491.2024.1.7787541791963f20272ad8e2026e1c3a)
---
We appreciate your donations! Donate today to help us keep engaging with our communities and to help us further the cause. We are planning on feeding our Border Patrol agents in Del Rio June 12, 2021.

Special Thanks to ALL those who donated for this event, we would not have been able to complete this mission if it was not for YOU! Sincerely, Latinos for Trump/Latinos for America First Bianca Gracia - President Maria Miller - National Coordinator Mayra Guttierrez - Texas State Director Rolando Rodriguez - Texas Asst. Director Malorie Lerma - Communications Director Maria Luthiger - South Texas Director Laura Kirby - Marketing Director Kristie Tertel - Press Secretary And from the rest of our Board of Directors! Thank YOU from our Latinos for America First Family * | | | We appreciate your donations! Donate today to help us keep engaging with our communities and to help us further the cause. We are planning on feeding our Border Patrol agents in Del Rio June 12, 2021. subject: Latinos for America First CALL TO ACTION on STATE of TEXAS
body:
DONATE NOW CALL TO ACTION PATRIOTS we need you to copy and paste the following letter and send to the following people listed on the letter e.g Gove
| |

[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=328060.2031.1.8cc7734db482c9fbc677dbabae1bff1e) |

---
**CALL TO ACTION** PATRIOTS we need you to copy and paste the following letter and send to the following people listed on the letter e.g Governor Greg Abbott. We the citizens of Texas demand that he do something about the Border Crisis. Our Border Patrol agents, law enforcement, and communities ARE UNDER SEIGE! To: Governor Abbott, Texas Senate, Lt Governor Dan Patrick Texas House of Representative, Speaker of the House Dade Phelan We, The People of Texas ask for Redress According to Article 1, Section 27 of the Texas Bill of Rights. We are suffering an invasion and suspension of laws outlawing criminal activities of; perpetrating human kidnapping and trafficking, murder, drugs killing our young, theft, denial of private property rights, and the illegal redirecting of State funds for illegal alien’s comfort which are intended for the beneficial use of citizens of Texas. Are Texans to sit with folded hands while criminals are committing crimes with impunity? Flouting our laws, prohibiting our Sheriffs from performance of their duties? Robbing us of hard earned income? The Citizens of Texas call out loudly for Governor Abbott to convene a Joint Session of the Legislature to declare a Law Enforcement State of Emergency and Disaster to repel the invasion of Criminals trafficking in Human Contraband, engaging in murder, drugs, and other illicit activity in the Great State of Texas, according to; Texas Government Code Homeland Security and Public Protection, Title 4. Subtitle B. Law Enforcement and Public Protection, Chapter 421. Section 421.001 (3) D an extraordinary law enforcement emergency and Section 421.002 Homeland Security Strategy (5) and (b) (5) protecting the State’s international border, ports, and airports. We also call upon the Governor to use all power activating the procurement of resources and Calling of Forces Draft under Title 4, Subtitle C. STATE MILITARY FORCES AND VETERANS CHAPTER 431. STATE MILITIA SUBTITLE C. Subchapter H. CALLING OF FORCES BY GOVERNOR and
Section 431.073 DRAFT to employ all military and law enforcement necessary to vanquish the invasion of criminals and return the Human Contraband to their homelands. Furthermore, Article I, Sec. 10, last clause of the United State Constitution; says, No State shall ...keep troops ...in time of Peace...or engage in War, Unless actually invaded,. So clearly, the Sovereign State of Texas may use their State Militia and defend its citizens from an invasion of criminals. Signed: Bianca Gracia, President
Latinos for America First Today, April 22, 2021

name: Congressman Ken Buck
subject: Take Back the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Buck for Colorado
body:
I am honored to announce that I am running for re-election in Colorado's 4th Congressional District. Ever since my first day in Congress, I have fought for the forgotten men and women of this country. From fighting for lower taxes, protecting your Second Amendment rights, and standing up for Conservatives being censored on Big Tech platforms, I’ve always stood up for the American People. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c944%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=S8feMnvccMDpHNVVWfxbtg&sysid=1)
Democrats and their allies will come for my campaign and try to smear my name.

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1129%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xxlk5L6xZT9C21kAnLZ0yQ&sysid=1)
---
Friends,

**I am honored to announce that I am running for[re-election in Colorado's 4th Congressional District.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1120%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5QJ65Za61zv6s4yix7h8JA&sysid=1)** Ever since my first day in Congress, I have fought for the forgotten men and women of this country. From fighting for lower taxes, protecting your Second Amendment rights, and standing up for Conservatives being censored on Big Tech platforms, I’ve always stood up for the American People.

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1129%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xxlk5L6xZT9C21kAnLZ0yQ&sysid=1) The American experiment runs on Freedom, not big government, cancel culture, and political correctness. I promise you that I will never back down from corrupt radical Democrats and their destructive policies. If they want to cancel you, they are going to have to cancel me first.

Democrats and their allies will come for my campaign and try to smear my name. I am willing to take the heat, and fight back to ensure that Republicans take back the House. **[I am going to need patriots to join me in my efforts:](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1121%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gxGBK1Jv2Z1ATde%2fB67oXA&sysid=1) ** | [**SUPPORT MY RE-ELECTION EFFORTS AND LET'S TAKE BACK THE HOUSE!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1122%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QjuRnuqihKqQCPMgf5YVzw&sysid=1)
---
I look forward to earning your support and taking on the political establishment for another 2 years. I will always deliver for Colorado. We need to keep this seat so Republicans can flip the House and stop Joe Biden’s radical agenda. [**$25 TO SUPPORT KEN**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1123%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ge9lgRrWwwLwvWPgb8645Q&sysid=1)
---
[**$50 TO SUPPORT KEN**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1124%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fdg04d3klIWG6MWibGvrEg&sysid=1)
---
[**$100 TO SUPPORT KEN**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1135%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EQ%2boyYFKczhyQIZOuCEZTA&sysid=1)
---

Thank you,
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1129%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xxlk5L6xZT9C21kAnLZ0yQ&sysid=1)
Congressman Ken Buck

name: Patty Acomb
subject: Addressing climate change
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y2G2QhZGuKdQdTf5Cz5T60AmgfQt9VsyvYuU7LCh7lA=/3iGkiY0Acc4Wnz2R7UikvuX66r7jAH7GyxWdb7DHync=?refcode=042221)
| | Friend, As one of the fastest warming states in the nation, Minnesota must act now to reduce our carbon footprint and greenhouse gas emissions. As the chair of the Climate Action Caucus in the Minnesota House, I am proud that we built our budget this year with a focus on climate change and equity. We are strongest when we work together. **Although we were able to get some movement on our climate initiatives in the Minnesota House this week, we face a tough challenge ahead to get them through the Republican-controlled Minnesota Senate.** If you haven't yet this year, will you make a refundable $50 (or $100 per couple) contribution to the Minnesota House DFL? _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ _ _ [**Contribute $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y2G2QhZGuKdQdTf5Cz5T60AmgfQt9VsyvYuU7LCh7lA=/3iGkiY0Acc4Wnz2R7UikvuX66r7jAH7GyxWdb7DHync=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=042221) [**Contribute $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y2G2QhZGuKdQdTf5Cz5T60AmgfQt9VsyvYuU7LCh7lA=/3iGkiY0Acc4Wnz2R7UikvuX66r7jAH7GyxWdb7DHync=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=042221) [**Or, another amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y2G2QhZGuKdQdTf5Cz5T60AmgfQt9VsyvYuU7LCh7lA=/3iGkiY0Acc4Wnz2R7UikvuX66r7jAH7GyxWdb7DHync=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=042221) _ __You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program._ **With your support, we can put pressure on our Senate Republican colleagues and make our climate initiatives a reality.** Together, we can build a more sustainable future for all Minnesotans. This Earth Day, I challenge you to reach out to Republicans in the Minnesota Senate and encourage them to come to the table on climate change. We are literally running out of time. We need to act and we need to act now. Thank you, Patty Acomb State Representative, District 44B _ _ [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y2G2QhZGuKdQdTf5Cz5T60AmgfQt9VsyvYuU7LCh7lA=/3iGkiY0Acc4Wnz2R7UikvuX66r7jAH7GyxWdb7DHync=?refcode=042221)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Expelled again?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marjorie
body:
Dear Peter --
In Nancy Pelosi's America, America's southern
border is ripped wide open with millions of dollars in taxpayer
handouts to illegals. . .
The D.C. Swamp is granted statehood. The
Supreme Court is packed with leftists judges. . .
Democrats seized control over America's
elections. . .
AOC's job-crushing Green New Deal wrecked
America's economy. . .

These are just some of the socialist power
grabs Democrats are fighting for every singe day.

I'm fighting harder to stop them.

STAND WITH MTG -- RUSH DONATE $25
That's why I introduced a resolution to EXPEL
Maxine Waters -- to fight back against these hate-America
leftists' attacks on America and hold them accountable.

And now, Nancy Pelosi's Democrats are trying
to "punish" me for doing just that.

You see, in Nancy Pelosi's America, Maxine
Waters' behavior isn't punished -- its rewarded!
Because I fought to hold hate-America leftist
Maxine Waters accountable, Nancy Pelosi's Democrats are -- once
again! -- trying to expel me from Congress!
And if that doesn't work, the Democrats are
preparing for an onslaught of negative attack ads against me in
next year's elections!
I'm talking about TENS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS
TO DEFEAT ME.
Will you please help me fight back with an
emergency $25 or more chip in right away.

Your donation provides me with the resources
to not only protect myself and fend off challengers, but support
other candidates who stand for America First!

We must have the resources to defend against
these nasty smear tactics and show that you and I and the America
First agenda are not going anywhere!
Make no mistake, the Radical Left, led by AOC
and the Squad, are trying to remove me from office for defending
President Trump. And as President Trump's biggest supporter, I've
become Enemy #1.
But in reality, they're not after me. They're
after you. I'm just in their way.
I must fight back. I must have the resources
to defend myself in the public sphere.
Will you stand with me? Chip in $15, $25,
$50, $100, $1,000 -- whatever you can afford -- right away.

I'm under constant assault from the most
radical socialists in Washington, D.C.
In fact, on top of Democrats trying to remove
me from office, the Fake News writes nonstop hit pieces, and the
Silicon Valley Cartel is always trying to shut me down.
But I will not be intimidated or silenced
because I have the support of you, the people!
If you stand with me, please, chip in with
whatever you can afford. Every bit helps me fight back through
email, text messages, phone calls and even social media (when I'm
not censored!).
Even if it's just $10, every dollar goes a
long way.
Thanks so much. I will keep you updated.
-- Marjorie Taylor Greene

Congresswoman (R-GA)

Paid for by Marjorie
Taylor Greene's People Over Politicians Committee - a joint
fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Greene for
Congress and Save America Stop Socialism PAC. Marjorie Taylor
Greene's People Over Politicians Committee PO Box 1575, Roswell,
Georgia 30077

We must STOP Big Tech tyranny.
Friend,

body:
Friend, we find it no coincidence at all that just DAYS after President Trump endorsed Ron Johnson, the Democratic National Committee sent out a smear piece against Ron.

This is only the beginning. >From here on out, it will come in waves of attacks, one after the other. From attack ads to smear campaigns, the left is doing everything they can to manipulate Americans into thinking just like them. All for their own benefit. How shameful.

With the media on their side, the DNC is actively working to silence, censor, and cancel any conservative viewpoint -- it will be our grassroots supporters that give us a chance against this.

Our records show that you are in the _92nd percentile_ of our STRONGEST grassroots leaders, Friend. We have set a goal to raise $10,000 by Sunday morning to FLOOD the Sunday shows with our response, and we need your leadership skills to help start this uphill climb.

name: Alvin Williams
subject: You have to see this video, Mr. Willis...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Black America's PAC Action Fund
body:
"Wow!" was my immediate response after seeing this video...
| | | _You're receiving this email because you support our mission to Black voters by destroying the Liberal Lies about "racist" conservatives. If you're giving up on this critical fight, please[unsubscribe](https://app.icontact.com/icp/mmail-mprofile.php?r=143017588&l=48802&s=6A2B&m=1157777&c=632087)._
---
| | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Dear Mr. Willis, Radical Democrat Congresswoman Maxine Waters is at it again... openly inciting violence against conservatives, police, and anyone else who stands in the radical Left's way. What's worse is that her repeated calls for physical violence have actually resulted in real-world physical violence, threats, and confrontations. | "That night we were assaulted by the crowd, I wasn't sure if we'd survive even with the police protection. But no Democrat has ever considered impeaching Maxine for her violent rhetoric." \- Senator Rand Paul
---
But this is exactly the kind of emotional, hate-filled, racist rhetoric we've come to expect from "Mad Maxine" Waters...
...after all, she has a long track-record of spreading racist lies, fomenting racial tension, and inciting violence to **HIDE** her crooked dealings from her constituents - _mostly Black & Hispanic voters living in some of America's poorest neighborhoods_.
As you can imagine, the level of rhetoric "Mad Maxine" requires these days is extremely high considering...
**...she's been one of the most crooked politicians in America for over 40 years!**
[](https://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=143017588&msgid=1157777&act=6A2B&c=632087&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bampac.org%2Fjoecollins%3Frecruiter_id%3D41689%26info%3D2021EA0402%26utm_source%3DiContact%26utm_campaign%3DJoeCollins%26sal%3DMr.+Willis%26ask%3D32utm_content%3D2021EA0402%26utm_medium%3DEmail&cf=48802&v=ac6c8412fed373691f727ce0fdc42b4e783100ebadcffed62a1a8e73ff36ff6c)**But U.S. Navy Veteran Joe Collins has had enough!**
Joe is on a mission to expose Maxine's sleazy profiteering and racist lies to Black & Hispanic voters in her district with videos like the one below.
[Watch the VIRAL video that "Mad" Maxine Waters and Democrats do NOT want Black voters to see.](https://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=143017588&msgid=1157777&act=6A2B&c=632087&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bampac.org%2Fjoecollins%3Frecruiter_id%3D41689%26info%3D2021EA0402%26utm_source%3DiContact%26utm_campaign%3DJoeCollins%26sal%3DMr.+Willis%26ask%3D32utm_content%3D2021EA0402%26utm_medium%3DEmail&cf=48802&v=ac6c8412fed373691f727ce0fdc42b4e783100ebadcffed62a1a8e73ff36ff6c)
[](https://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=143017588&msgid=1157777&act=6A2B&c=632087&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bampac.org%2Fjoecollins%3Frecruiter_id%3D41689%26info%3D2021EA0402%26utm_source%3DiContact%26utm_campaign%3DJoeCollins%26sal%3DMr.+Willis%26ask%3D32utm_content%3D2021EA0402%26utm_medium%3DEmail&cf=48802&v=ac6c8412fed373691f727ce0fdc42b4e783100ebadcffed62a1a8e73ff36ff6c)
Joe Collins is going all-in to take back his community and retire Maxine Waters once-and-for-all...
...but he's going to need the full backing and support of every patriotic conservative he can get to dethrone one of the longest sitting politicians in Washington!
[That's why I'm counting on you to help Joe Collins DEFEAT "Mad Maxine" Waters and DESTROY the Liberal Lies with an urgent contribution of $28, $40, $75, $150, $500, $1000 or more today!](https://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=143017588&msgid=1157777&act=6A2B&c=632087&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bampac.org%2Fjoecollins%3Frecruiter_id%3D41689%26info%3D2021EA0402%26utm_source%3DiContact%26utm_campaign%3DJoeCollins%26sal%3DMr.+Willis%26ask%3D32utm_content%3D2021EA0402%26utm_medium%3DEmail&cf=48802&v=ac6c8412fed373691f727ce0fdc42b4e783100ebadcffed62a1a8e73ff36ff6c)
Or if you can't afford that much right now, please contribute $20.21, $10, or even $5 as a symbol of your support.
Thank you, and God Bless.
|
Alvin Williams

name: Desk of Marco Rubio
subject: TOP 10 SENATE SEATS MOST LIKELY TO FLIP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
🚨 This is serious, %%=v(@sFirstName)=%%. 🚨
|
---
| | | | [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b6HL9UEU1A39yBb819dpru-3zUUTD4xjBsEMSe2k-zp6fDhAzMAarFxD4bOBaPq4SXwqYRgBX9Xc9yaYQLkT3-3ev3RBwnRpq2RX-mgk_VduZWPcrHD6rCseT7w4aoKwUb8OaVBchbDWhTtLQGVTyaR7vnSGn7IIUnvLduJCl-oP7GKwbU__kWfuQpfj09b2truFYHUjEYAUUtIaKexrhoZ2WLs3wLu6pw3kXta2rr3__S_w_srYaGQHpyxlkdkNhu08-pcqqsdyAT-f_Gr6tlcymZgUUg6QwE1O0MjArXBvNde5l1bV_FXWjf9g_IjvLzxymf6-p_tb0t6Lbxwch-VGYEuK408d_YxecZiOH6hCA6GOjcLMCZkDRLGVYrCnavQwcPXRGYXIT6VSPDq2-OnndI2rQrZ5cP3Uvu_v8witifkLpx2Aw-KtC8ERJVz-&c=a2S514dktbaBxwUPOLrlhKMDufnfv5zcT2WnJxCWSReJlyGQM_zWAw==&ch=kFOggivZxNtlSd2EXOjDaC5-vcUr7B0XzMHgC_y3QQLqYnXysUtwkQ== "From the Desk of Marco Rubio")
---
🚨 This is serious, Friend. 🚨
**CNN has named MY race as one of the TOP TEN seats most likely to flip. **
President Trump endorsed me because I am a fighter who stands up to China and fights for the forgotten men and women of this country. Liberals hate it, and they are energized to defeat us.

This is yet another reason why it is so important that I have you on my team, Friend. While the liberals who are targeting me have millionaire donors to rely on, I rely on hard-working Americans like you to help me fight off their lying attacks.

As Chuck Schumer schemes to decide who he wants to run against me, now is the time for us to organize and build a world class campaign. We can't afford to lose any ground, so we must take advantage of this opportunity to get out ahead of the Democrats!

body:
We CANNOT let them DESTROY President Trump and Vice President Mike Pence's incredible legacy. GOP Leadership needs to know where you stand:

_Fellow Conservative, you have**MISSED** messages from Vice President Mike Pence.

Was this a mistake?

...Or do you truly not support VP Mike Pence, Conservative values and protecting Trump's legacy?_

**If IGNORING Mike Pence was a mistake and you are in fact a TOP conservative, I have attached his important message for your review here:**

Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have all but DESTROYED the progress that the Trump administration and House Conservatives achieved in the past 4 years.

If you support the protection of Conservative values and our efforts to maintain President Trump and Vice President Mike Pence's historic legacy, then you MUST act now, Fellow Conservative!
**
We CANNOT let them DESTROY President Trump and Vice President Mike Pence 's incredible legacy. GOP Leadership needs to know where you stand:**

**READ VP MIKE PENCE 'S MESSAGE NOW!**

Thank you,

House Conservatives

\--------Forwarded Message--------

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Add Your Name: Pass The George Floyd Justice in Policing Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
We still have no accountability for Breonna Taylor or Tamir Rice or...
#

When the Derek Chauvin verdict was announced on Tuesday — GUILTY on all counts for the murder of George Floyd — I breathed a sigh of relief along with the rest of the country.
But this was not justice. This was accountability. In a just world, George Floyd would be alive today.
**[We must continue our fight to pass the _George Floyd Justice in Policing Act_ in the Senate to ensure that what happened to George Floyd never happens again. If you agree, add your name to my petition to tell me you’re with me in the fight for racial justice and meaningful police reform.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28056210/282033980/-1732431995?refcode2=bcb0ac2b-99a3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210422-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2IwYWMyYi05OWEzLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NhZfssL93bBNc6_eXmlqIkr5GEI2KkovxlwgqTCh_wo=&emci=0edace1a-99a3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=bcb0ac2b-99a3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=24719896)**
A conviction in the Derek Chauvin case is the baseline we should expect in a civilized society.
The fact that we had graphic video of the crime and persuasive, comprehensive witness and expert testimony and we were _still_ on the edge of our seats shows that we’ve got a lot of work to do to reform our criminal legal system.
In this case, we got accountability — but all too often, police officers have gotten away with killing people they swore to protect, especially Black people. We still have no accountability for Breonna Taylor or Tamir Rice or Philando Castile or Adam Toledo or countless others.
**Getting the _George Floyd Justice in Policing Act_ signed into law would be a critical first step in the direction of justice. We passed it in the House, and now the Senate must do its job and pass it as well.**
**[Please add your name to my petition to help keep up the pressure on the Senate to pass the _George Floyd Justice in Policing Act_. We must keep up this momentum and make real, lasting change in this country in the pursuit of racial justice.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28056211/282033981/-1732431995?refcode2=bcb0ac2b-99a3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210422-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2IwYWMyYi05OWEzLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NhZfssL93bBNc6_eXmlqIkr5GEI2KkovxlwgqTCh_wo=&emci=0edace1a-99a3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=bcb0ac2b-99a3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=24719896)**
Thank you for standing with me in the fight for real justice. It has been a long time coming, but this week showed us that we can create the change we seek in our society, but only if we work relentlessly for it.
Onward,
Mondaire
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28056212/282033982/-1732431995?refcode2=bcb0ac2b-99a3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210422-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2IwYWMyYi05OWEzLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NhZfssL93bBNc6_eXmlqIkr5GEI2KkovxlwgqTCh_wo=&emci=0edace1a-99a3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=bcb0ac2b-99a3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=24719896)**

body:
Congresswoman Maxine Waters' recent comments during a Black Lives Matter protest, though, take things even further.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KB5Uca84uGxLFVVLcEPEL73K0p5YOEYmgRFZfJPMvmzhfZoyxRr3YjPBCB5OhxJhp2vnQsqvZAHx8BPtPcli9OlM3eYI8Dg8S2d3WkR__XVry745EIWvXwutdm7U0jiYBcaXq8_GgWQY7Xdl32Vnw-pC2hqJeliVfqZPNAYZu0RjG8J1Tmw2CwMLOoKJPwH58AxgWkIYYo9Hg5gzWOeFeKsHtaJle9OXSDCiFyLxSxinN76MmrBjEtb6JM1dMW1BJOd86wxPbmdddN_pNJveOm3na2liKlHYbDSzlGsId-wTl81GuVk8jW9kFhEhLi1-ZP8IFZys9C_v2JLwLuHdxBGUwoHonJSAEnqzSJjL6j6lUT0bFq9AqYot_4HOL9tfKeyFbEddG-_7ENAoOWuiBK_jqu6waclCLofoJTv6KKo=&c=gztnA3IXlj2cvCjb74P2tsci69DJphcL0wabxIpvC4rDDNI4USV0Iw==&ch=kfUIUs_K7gfosChN8Zf1_m-BW-OJ307yw8Y5kyYjhd4nDKEu9BPzyw==) Friend,

It's no secret that liberals want to DEFUND the police.

Congresswoman Maxine Waters' recent comments during a Black Lives Matter protest, though, take things even further.
**" We got to stay on the streets, and we've got to get more active. We've got to get more confrontational. We've got to make sure they know we mean business."** _Congresswoman Maxine Waters (D-CA)_
**Waters ' inflammatory comments will incite even MORE violence in our streets, and even MORE hatred toward our police in the wake of the 'defund the police' movement.**

Look, Friend, police are the good guys. We must put a STOP to Maxine Waters and the rest of the liberal Left's reckless commentary before it's too late.
[**Do you agree, Friend? CLICK HERE to add your name to the petition to BACK THE BLUE >>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KB5Uca84uGxLFVVLcEPEL73K0p5YOEYmgRFZfJPMvmzhfZoyxRr3YjPBCB5OhxJhp2vnQsqvZAHx8BPtPcli9OlM3eYI8Dg8S2d3WkR__XVry745EIWvXwutdm7U0jiYBcaXq8_GgWQY7Xdl32Vnw-pC2hqJeliVfqZPNAYZu0RjG8J1Tmw2CwMLOoKJPwH58AxgWkIYYo9Hg5gzWOeFeKsHtaJle9OXSDCiFyLxSxinN76MmrBjEtb6JM1dMW1BJOd86wxPbmdddN_pNJveOm3na2liKlHYbDSzlGsId-wTl81GuVk8jW9kFhEhLi1-ZP8IFZys9C_v2JLwLuHdxBGUwoHonJSAEnqzSJjL6j6lUT0bFq9AqYot_4HOL9tfKeyFbEddG-_7ENAoOWuiBK_jqu6waclCLofoJTv6KKo=&c=gztnA3IXlj2cvCjb74P2tsci69DJphcL0wabxIpvC4rDDNI4USV0Iw==&ch=kfUIUs_K7gfosChN8Zf1_m-BW-OJ307yw8Y5kyYjhd4nDKEu9BPzyw==)
| **[**BACK THE BLUE**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KB5Uca84uGxLFVVLcEPEL73K0p5YOEYmgRFZfJPMvmzhfZoyxRr3YjPBCB5OhxJhp2vnQsqvZAHx8BPtPcli9OlM3eYI8Dg8S2d3WkR__XVry745EIWvXwutdm7U0jiYBcaXq8_GgWQY7Xdl32Vnw-pC2hqJeliVfqZPNAYZu0RjG8J1Tmw2CwMLOoKJPwH58AxgWkIYYo9Hg5gzWOeFeKsHtaJle9OXSDCiFyLxSxinN76MmrBjEtb6JM1dMW1BJOd86wxPbmdddN_pNJveOm3na2liKlHYbDSzlGsId-wTl81GuVk8jW9kFhEhLi1-ZP8IFZys9C_v2JLwLuHdxBGUwoHonJSAEnqzSJjL6j6lUT0bFq9AqYot_4HOL9tfKeyFbEddG-_7ENAoOWuiBK_jqu6waclCLofoJTv6KKo=&c=gztnA3IXlj2cvCjb74P2tsci69DJphcL0wabxIpvC4rDDNI4USV0Iw==&ch=kfUIUs_K7gfosChN8Zf1_m-BW-OJ307yw8Y5kyYjhd4nDKEu9BPzyw==)**

Democrat leaders are now ev **ALERT:** Democrats are escalating their efforts to defund the police. That makes it more important than ever that we stand by law and order candidates who will defend our police and keep America safe. **[Join me to support them by chipping in now>>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4ede9bd155a84f9895a735d45e6cf3df&_e=pXHZAQ7reRVyhjLlwfTBSjq0jWg89SCvl82ZRay3w6siH07HR7t3xO-ReNvt0eRdYsFIf47rsMGjpik-p7hDSsVdg2P-_H3fQOWfEz_QS5grAHl-JFefI4fP0ldQ8aWg_PRCZoqTpD47MTcUzDROAXj8DCsqQmfhZD-1kf160JFaxEAYLu3C90HqD_GOy1wALlUo-QPaF_i165ZG7ugbWf47iy7Rzh0_CN3s0vnddD57EJbtVqw8hVXenMSHdSPNJL_6XEzOyRNUXqGJWoDnczD0D8LdZyUlANaA15aVPGrySgWtGc2vLlnIUlh-FUtX40_hyQ9v_KUBIed-6eiNn4QnJQBG_gwwNj2szaEuHXY%3D)** [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4ede9bd155a84f9895a735d45e6cf3df&_e=pXHZAQ7reRVyhjLlwfTBSjq0jWg89SCvl82ZRay3w6siH07HR7t3xO-ReNvt0eRdYsFIf47rsMGjpik-p7hDSsVdg2P-_H3fQOWfEz_QS5grAHl-JFefI4fP0ldQ8aWg_PRCZoqTpD47MTcUzDROAc8dzAqXorszhtAg50gBF48mnF8guTs4iHVnzTvpqhPu4bcO4QjZJPc4GaGnlUzQffHPlVJSN2HH9Vzqe7nX9Tj2xrRsibaMMoZGLokplsiOAZJat_Ehskt3r07cWU8Yli6ZHHBEwNxW71JVJxDisaVwD4y0uSWPTbFu9yNKa00QQsYkfY8WbdRs2_TIV_Fqt6Ay1QQ1llxls1EMhVun8FM%3D) Friend, radical liberals like Maxine Waters in Washington want you to believe that America is a horrible nation. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4ede9bd155a84f9895a735d45e6cf3df&_e=pXHZAQ7reRVyhjLlwfTBSjq0jWg89SCvl82ZRay3w6siH07HR7t3xO-ReNvt0eRdYsFIf47rsMGjpik-p7hDSsVdg2P-_H3fQOWfEz_QS5grAHl-JFefI4fP0ldQ8aWg_PRCZoqTpD47MTcUzDROAfkfdfFG4fbV_Z-Nqjz7AYCt5IaaoG3cAaK30SvqxHh2Pq9E_cDAdPZvLCVehwUzDxpDpUXDwZjyayo-ziMangBK7CM6SS7SF6SWUNVcBMZIzOsrZKzcewJcVZZk3Xi9ILMO5yckTGxk3aLnn66zYWr6sUKexK8VgM-HpJ0QHpPV3HKGVceKYHiQpXofsZ-eOlxOIcuoLOubiqoXf1DGJ4Q%3D) They say our people are racists, our cops are corrupt, and America would be better off if we defund or abolish our police. Democrat leaders are now even demanding we "reimagine" our law enforcement after making outrageous claims about their so-called bias. _They couldn 't be more wrong, friend._ The truth is, efforts to defund the police are an attack on American families. They would lead to unsafe streets and more violence in America's cities -- we're seeing it already in cities like Minneapolis and Portland where the City Council completely dismantled their police departments. The hard truth is... you won't be safe in this liberal America. We need leaders who will stand with those who stand with our men and women on the Thin Blue Line and promise to never defund the police -- not now, not ever. [**I AGREE: CHIP IN NOW**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4ede9bd155a84f9895a735d45e6cf3df&_e=pXHZAQ7reRVyhjLlwfTBSjq0jWg89SCvl82ZRay3w6siH07HR7t3xO-ReNvt0eRdYsFIf47rsMGjpik-p7hDSsVdg2P-_H3fQOWfEz_QS5grAHl-JFefI4fP0ldQ8aWg_PRCZoqTpD47MTcUzDROAfPV1_RXu0B-ESDBOnOiLd6WCZIFiKG8-iGA_-FFD5poH4JRsSREhf-wfjj0H66R0EemXeSGpCboKy-0kV23wEEwMgcxtGbsaC9SnIy7YKAkZB_FDfxMTlERE3tW9i42sj-jDzKETLMe0l4xmvjs4EbPikqzXSDck-Zwn8bRqbf_xzEC1t3urkdhApB17pgdH2IXqOd47ZS7SGgFU6-22gQ%3D) For over a year, Democrats have ignored the violence and chaos engulfing their cities across this country. They continue to promote it with anti-law enforcement rhetoric at every turn. Frankly, it's un-American. **Let me be clear: too many heroes have died defending our freedoms to see Americans strike each other down. ** The men and women that put on the uniform of law enforcement are the best of us. They put their lives on the line every day. And the candidates of the next generation must stand with our police officers. _We need law and order on the streets of America - not politicians who pit us against the police._ They believe they should dictate how we live, how we work, how we worship, how we raise our children, how we police our communities - and they're willing to take away our freedom and "cancel" anyone who does not stand in line. **The modern Leftist agenda is based on control. We need leaders whose agenda will be based on freedom.** Where they support raising taxes, we support tax cuts. Where they rally to cancel the Keystone XL pipeline and impose climate change regulations that drastically impact working families, we support American energy independence. Where they surrender to China, we fight for free and fair trade. Where they become cheerleaders for communist regimes, we defend democracy and stand for liberty for all.
**_Where they want to defund our police, we stand for law and order and safe communities._** When you consider everything the Left works for, it becomes more clear than ever that we cannot allow Democrats to be in power. clean_body: They say our people are racists, our cops are corrupt, and America would be better off if we defund or abolish our police. Democrat leaders are now ev ALERT: Democrats are escalating their efforts to defund the police. That makes it more important than ever that we stand by law and order candidates who will defend our police and keep America safe. Friend, radical liberals like Maxine Waters in Washington want you to believe that America is a horrible nation. They say our people are racists, our cops are corrupt, and America would be better off if we defund or abolish our police. Democrat leaders are now even demanding we "reimagine" our law enforcement after making outrageous claims about their so-called bias. They couldn 't be more wrong, friend. The truth is, efforts to defund the police are an attack on American families. They would lead to unsafe streets and more violence in America's cities -- we're seeing it already in cities like Minneapolis and Portland where the City Council completely dismantled their police departments. The hard truth is... you won't be safe in this liberal America. We need leaders who will stand with those who stand with our men and women on the Thin Blue Line and promise to never defund the police -- not now, not ever. For over a year, Democrats have ignored the violence and chaos engulfing their cities across this country. They continue to promote it with anti-law enforcement rhetoric at every turn. Frankly, it's un-American. Let me be clear: too many heroes have died defending our freedoms to see Americans strike each other down. The men and women that put on the uniform of law enforcement are the best of us. They put their lives on the line every day. And the candidates of the next generation must stand with our police officers. We need law and order on the streets of America - not politicians who pit us against the police. If you agree, please chip in to support conservatives in 2022 who will back the blue: Over the past decade, the Democratic party has become so radical, it's hardly recognizable. At the root of their agenda is the belief that their radical views must be adopted in every aspect of our lives. They believe they should dictate how we live, how we work, how we worship, how we raise our children, how we police our communities - and they're willing to take away our freedom and "cancel" anyone who does not stand in line. The modern Leftist agenda is based on control. We need leaders whose agenda will be based on freedom. Where they support raising taxes, we support tax cuts. Where they rally to cancel the Keystone XL pipeline and impose climate change regulations that drastically impact working families, we support American energy independence. Where they surrender to China, we fight for free and fair trade. Where they become cheerleaders for communist regimes, we defend democracy and stand for liberty for all. Where they want to defund our police, we stand for law and order and safe communities. When you consider everything the Left works for, it becomes more clear than ever that we cannot allow Democrats to be in power. There's no doubt that we've got a tough path ahead, but believe me friend, we've overcome bigger obstacles before and we will do it again! If conservatives rally together now to support our best and brightest, we will win in 2022 and put America back on the path to greatness. Thank you for reading, friend. | | Earth Day is a reminder that elections matter, friends, especially when it comes to combating climate change.

Defeating Donald Trump allowed us to reenter the Paris climate accord... **_but it’s not enough_**.

Flipping the Senate has finally put investments in green infrastructure on the Senate’s agenda for the first time in years. Now is the time to act, and when better than Earth Day to recommit to the fight against climate change?

**[If you support _bigger_ and _bolder_ action on climate change, sign Mark Warner’s petition and join Mark in demanding action on climate change.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28059245/282044370/-82756476?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzZjMzU0My1hM2EzLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7jM4tZmwFYsaX5_UIFc33Tx_od-zWinRyheEXc-3Fd4=&emci=4bd33516-98a3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=0c6c3543-a3a3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=4568237)**

**Last year, Mark passed the Great American Outdoors Act — which was the _largest investment in conservation, national parks, and public lands_ in a generation.** Mark was able to do this even with Donald Trump in the White House, but the Senator knows we need to do more to protect our environment.

With Joe Biden in the White House and Democratic majorities in the House and Senate, _**now**_ is the time to do the hard work of pursuing climate justice and protecting our planet for future generations. We can take meaningful strides toward stopping climate change, but only if we do it together.

**[Add your name to the petition. Join the rising call for bigger, bolder climate action.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28059246/282044371/-82756476?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzZjMzU0My1hM2EzLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7jM4tZmwFYsaX5_UIFc33Tx_od-zWinRyheEXc-3Fd4=&emci=4bd33516-98a3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=0c6c3543-a3a3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=4568237)**

Thank you,
Policy Team, Mark Warner for Virginia | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28059247/282044372/1255384152?refcode=ris_20210422_e_p_us_na_na_climatechangepetition&refcode2=cont&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzZjMzU0My1hM2EzLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7jM4tZmwFYsaX5_UIFc33Tx_od-zWinRyheEXc-3Fd4=)

name: Erica Smith for U.S. Senate
subject: Read about my Platform for Progress:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica For US - Senate 2022 Campaign Committee
body:
When I get to Washington, I'm taking all of us with me. I'll fight for policies that combat income inequality, racial injustice, the climate crisis, and so much more.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-W1L3KtGQlB33iWJO8c5l-QR-fV8fBmmIqqhAPHwCqA=/9wBtvKuNusRPJs-AETR8wAUcPu-DrGqHVHqmvbBqi-0=?refcode=em20210422-1)
Right now, in North Carolina and across our country, our communities are facing bigger challenges than ever before.
We can't afford more of the same -- **this moment calls for something different because our survival depends on it. It calls for policy, not platitudes.**
That's why I'm proud of our Platform for Progress, an agenda bold enough and big enough to lift working people across North Carolina up.
[**_If you 're in this with me, will you make a contribution right now to power our grassroots movement? Together, we can make our progressive agenda a reality (and, if you chip in now, you'll be an official Founding Donor of our campaign)._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-W1L3KtGQlB33iWJO8c5l-QR-fV8fBmmIqqhAPHwCqA=/9wBtvKuNusRPJs-AETR8wAUcPu-DrGqHVHqmvbBqi-0=?refcode=em20210422-1)
**[Donate»](https://act.myngp.com/el/-W1L3KtGQlB33iWJO8c5l-QR-fV8fBmmIqqhAPHwCqA=/9wBtvKuNusRPJs-AETR8wAUcPu-DrGqHVHqmvbBqi-0=?refcode=em20210422-1)**
---
For too long, policy has centered profits at the expense of people and corporations at the expense of workers. All the while, our communities remain unseen, and their cries, unheard.
**When I get to Washington, I 'm taking all of us with me. I'll fight for policies that combat income inequality, racial injustice, the climate crisis, and so much more.**
You'll hear more in the coming weeks about each of my priorities, but here's just a preview of our transformative agenda:
* **Medicare for All** : Reform is not enough. We deserve a healthcare system that prioritizes people over profits. We need Medicare for All.
* **Green New Deal** : The climate crisis is already here, and worsening storms and floods are claiming lives and livelihoods. By passing the Green New Deal, we can combat climate change and create millions of good-paying jobs at the same time.
* **Universal Broadband** : It's time to treat broadband as the public utility it is. In too many communities, including my own, access to broadband internet is still not a reality. Universal broadband would put an end to this inequity and ensure equal access for all.
* **Racial Justice** : From ending the War on Drugs and reimagining public safety to creating generational prosperity by investing in Black communities with reparations, we can legislate justice.
* **The Dignity of Work** : The minimum wage needs to be a living wage, and $15 is the floor, not the ceiling. I will strengthen overtime pay protections and ensure paid family leave is guaranteed.

This is OUR platform. This is OUR movement. **But I can 't do it without you.** It's going to take a massive grassroots movement to make this real, meaningful change a reality.
[**_So I 'm asking: Will you become a Founding Donor to Erica Smith for U.S. Senate and help us build a winning campaign? Click here to make a donation now._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-W1L3KtGQlB33iWJO8c5l-QR-fV8fBmmIqqhAPHwCqA=/9wBtvKuNusRPJs-AETR8wAUcPu-DrGqHVHqmvbBqi-0=?refcode=em20210422-1)
Thank you for being a part of this,
Erica

clean_body: When I get to Washington, I'm taking all of us with me. I'll fight for policies that combat income inequality, racial injustice, the climate crisis, and so much more. Right now, in North Carolina and across our country, our communities are facing bigger challenges than ever before. We can't afford more of the same -- this moment calls for something different because our survival depends on it. It calls for policy, not platitudes. That's why I'm proud of our Platform for Progress, an agenda bold enough and big enough to lift working people across North Carolina up. For too long, policy has centered profits at the expense of people and corporations at the expense of workers. All the while, our communities remain unseen, and their cries, unheard. When I get to Washington, I 'm taking all of us with me. I'll fight for policies that combat income inequality, racial injustice, the climate crisis, and so much more. You'll hear more in the coming weeks about each of my priorities, but here's just a preview of our transformative agenda: Medicare for All : Reform is not enough. We deserve a healthcare system that prioritizes people over profits. We need Medicare for All. Green New Deal : The climate crisis is already here, and worsening storms and floods are claiming lives and livelihoods. By passing the Green New Deal, we can combat climate change and create millions of good-paying jobs at the same time. Universal Broadband : It's time to treat broadband as the public utility it is. In too many communities, including my own, access to broadband internet is still not a reality. Universal broadband would put an end to this inequity and ensure equal access for all. Racial Justice : From ending the War on Drugs and reimagining public safety to creating generational prosperity by investing in Black communities with reparations, we can legislate justice. The Dignity of Work : The minimum wage needs to be a living wage, and $15 is the floor, not the ceiling. I will strengthen overtime pay protections and ensure paid family leave is guaranteed. This is OUR platform. This is OUR movement. But I can 't do it without you. It's going to take a massive grassroots movement to make this real, meaningful change a reality. Thank you for being a part of this, Erica ** Paid for by Erica For US - Senate 2022 Campaign Committee Erica For US PO Box 1236 Gaston NC 27832 United States

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28060835/282053072/2005830277?refcode=20210422_TM_EarthDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGE5NmZiYy1hOGEzLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jtt-X5z3FjAlf-ukqobj0g5k2_THoNOp4l6LffAG-Eg=) Friend, On this 51st Earth Day, President Biden has committed the U.S. to cutting emissions in half by 2030 to address the ongoing climate crisis. **This ambitious commitment would put the U.S. back at the forefront of a global effort to curb carbon emissions.[ Will you add your name to join us in supporting Biden’s plan?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28060836/282053073/-2144448255?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGE5NmZiYy1hOGEzLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jtt-X5z3FjAlf-ukqobj0g5k2_THoNOp4l6LffAG-Eg=&emci=bf51c49f-9ca3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=dda96fbc-a8a3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=194769)** The effects of climate change are vast, devastating, and inescapable. From rising sea levels and shrinking glaciers to historic wildfires and heavy rain, we’ve already begun to see the damage of climate change. The impact we’re seeing will only continue to escalate if we fail to act boldly and swiftly — both on an individual level and a policy level in the states and federal government. Here in Massachusetts, we have incredible natural resources that we should be proud to protect, and vital economic sectors from forestry to agriculture to fisheries that need to be sustainably managed for future generations. We also share a border with the rising Atlantic Ocean, making climate change a huge priority for all of us. That's why our state is [leading the Transportation and Climate Initiative](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28060837/282053074/1708082541?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGE5NmZiYy1hOGEzLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jtt-X5z3FjAlf-ukqobj0g5k2_THoNOp4l6LffAG-Eg=&emci=bf51c49f-9ca3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=dda96fbc-a8a3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=194769) to develop the regional clean energy economy and reduce emissions from transportation. This is the defining issue of our generation. [**On Earth Day, join us in recommitting to the fight against climate change and in support of Joe Biden’s climate plan.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28060838/282053075/-2144448255?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGE5NmZiYy1hOGEzLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jtt-X5z3FjAlf-ukqobj0g5k2_THoNOp4l6LffAG-Eg=&emci=bf51c49f-9ca3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=dda96fbc-a8a3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=194769) name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: You stopped earmarks from coming back!
body:
| |
---
You did it! _**You helped us convince the Senate Republicans to keep their ban on earmarks in place!**_

With the constant onslaught of crazy from the Biden Administration and Congressional Democrats, I wanted to make sure you knew about this win.

I know that earmarks seem arcane, or it might seem like they don’t matter compared to the flood of extremist policies and actions we have to fight every day.

However, earmarks are one of two keys the left has to unlock their radical agenda; earmarks and ending the filibuster. See, using earmarks, the Democrats could potentially bribe Republican Senators into voting yes on some of their bills, even some of their worst legislation.

So, it was crucial that we keep the Republican Senators from voting to end their ban on earmarks.

**Thanks to you, we did it!**

It’s a huge win, even if the media hardly mentions it.

Thank you, and remember to keep your hope alive! We can and will win!

In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
|
---

name: Tim Scott
subject: BIG NEWS: I’m giving the Official GOP Response to Biden
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
%%First Name%%, I have set an ambitious goal of ACTIVATING 15,000 patriots to stand with me before I give my speech.

Friend,

As one of my most loyal supporters, I wanted you to hear this BIG NEWS from me first.

**I will be delivering the Official GOP Response to President Biden 's first address to Congress.**

I am grateful and honored to have the opportunity to share my positive conservative message with millions of Americans.

While I am excited to have this platform, I also know that the far Left and liberal media are already gearing up to attack me.

_**Friend, I have set an ambitious goal of ACTIVATING 15,000 patriots to stand with me before I give my speech.**_
[Stand with Me](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/big-news-speech/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210422_TY-2.101720_tim-scott_t1059116-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210422_big-news-im-giving-the-official-gop-response-to-biden/)
---

[**A donation of $10, $25, $50 or whatever amount you can afford will help us prepare for the attacks from the Left.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/big-news-speech/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210422_TY-2.101720_tim-scott_t1059116-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210422_big-news-im-giving-the-official-gop-response-to-biden/)

You see, the liberal media has always tried to silence my voice. A Black conservative from South Carolina does not fit the narrative the media tries to create about the Republican Party.

_They don 't want to acknowledge the uniquely American journey of my family--from cotton to Congress in one lifetime.

They don't want to hear my story of growing up in a single-parent household and nearly failing out of high school, but rising above it to find success.

They don't want to hear about me becoming the first Black Senator elected from the South since Reconstruction._

[**Friend, please dig deep and make whatever donation you can afford to join our team.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/big-news-speech/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210422_TY-2.101720_tim-scott_t1059116-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210422_big-news-im-giving-the-official-gop-response-to-biden/) As I write, I'm sure Democrats and the liberal media are already attacking me for speaking out about my conservative journey.

I need you to stand with me.
[Stand with Me](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/big-news-speech/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210422_TY-2.101720_tim-scott_t1059116-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210422_big-news-im-giving-the-official-gop-response-to-biden/)
---

Tim Scott

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: This week in Washington...
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fa5130c67c9f/this-week-in-washington?e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
# 2nd Vote Advisors launches new conservative fund...
The Right likes to talk about all these companies that weigh in on social issues and take liberal stances, like Nike, Coca-Cola, Twitter, and more than you could name, but it always leave me wondering, what can we actually do about it? Well, 2nd Vote Advisors has launched two ETF’s (LYFE and EGIS) that invest in companies that prioritize socially conservative or at least neutral stances. The CEO, Dan Gray joined us Monday night on _Spicer & Co_ to discuss how they’re deciding who to invest in...
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=5f4dbca416&e=f6564bbe3b)
| [Learn more about them here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=0eea3db249&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
# Media coverage of the Biden Administration by the numbers...
Media Research Center put out this study, [“Once Top Trump-Bashers, TV News Now Loves Joe Biden”](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e856ab1851&e=f6564bbe3b). The headline is pretty self explanatory and might seem obvious to those of us that are paying attention, but MRC does a great job breaking down the difference in coverage between this administration and the last. As I’ve pointed out many times on _Spicer & Co_, a lot of cable news networks see themselves as an extension of the Biden press shop, so I’m actually surprised only 59% of Biden’s coverage is positive.
| | | |
---
# Make sure to tune into _Spicer & Co_ at 6p...
Newsmax is launching a new show in the 9p hour soon, when _Spicer & Co_ used to air for a second time. Make sure that if you can’t catch us at 6p, you set your DVR to record our 6p show.
| | | |
---
Last week I asked if colleges/universities should be allowed to mandate the COVID19 vaccine (with religious and medical exceptions) [the results were pretty clear](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9bc0b7a537&e=f6564bbe3b)...
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9df8890aa2&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
# What I’m reading this week...
| | | | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=d96863593b&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
# _[Religious Liberty in Crisis](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=bfc0925ed1&e=f6564bbe3b)_ by Ken Starr
We’re covering this topic this week on _Spicer & Co_ and Ken will be joining us to discuss his important book. You can hear more about it tomorrow night on _Spicer & Co_, but I highly recommend it. |
---
[Get a Copy Here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=bf3557cfbc&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
## Follow along on social media:
| | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=fca16fa9da&e=f6564bbe3b)| [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6227bb541e&e=f6564bbe3b)| [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=4b4d46cfd2&e=f6564bbe3b)| [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=5372c9e9a2&e=f6564bbe3b)| [](mailto:contact@seanspicer.com)

name: Latinos for America First
subject: Latinos for America First CALL TO ACTION on STATE of TEXAS
body:
DONATE NOW CALL TO ACTION PATRIOTS we need you to copy and paste the following letter and send to the following people listed on the letter e.g Gove
| |
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=335972.2073.1.f9f2b1fd84e0ce746d9b612d95d160cd) |
---
| | [ DONATE NOW ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=335972.2074.1.560b57354b4e0dcfcb183db1fd65a297)
---
**CALL TO ACTION** PATRIOTS we need you to copy and paste the following letter and send to the following people listed on the letter e.g Governor Greg Abbott. We the citizens of Texas demand that he do something about the Border Crisis. Our Border Patrol agents, law enforcement, and communities ARE UNDER SEIGE! To: Governor Abbott, Texas Senate, Lt Governor Dan Patrick Texas House of Representative, Speaker of the House Dade Phelan We, The People of Texas ask for Redress According to Article 1, Section 27 of the Texas Bill of Rights. We are suffering an invasion and suspension of laws outlawing criminal activities of; perpetrating human kidnapping and trafficking, murder, drugs killing our young, theft, denial of private property rights, and the illegal redirecting of State funds for illegal alien’s comfort which are intended for the beneficial use of citizens of Texas. Are Texans to sit with folded hands while criminals are committing crimes with impunity? Flouting our laws, prohibiting our Sheriffs from performance of their duties? Robbing us of hard earned income? The Citizens of Texas call out loudly for Governor Abbott to convene a Joint Session of the Legislature to declare a Law Enforcement State of Emergency and Disaster to repel the invasion of Criminals trafficking in Human Contraband, engaging in murder, drugs, and other illicit activity in the Great State of Texas, according to; Texas Government Code Homeland Security and Public Protection, Title 4. Subtitle B. Law Enforcement and Public Protection, Chapter 421. Section 421.001 (3) D an extraordinary law enforcement emergency and Section 421.002 Homeland Security Strategy (5) and (b) (5) protecting the State’s international border, ports, and airports. We also call upon the Governor to use all power activating the procurement of resources and Calling of Forces Draft under Title 4, Subtitle C. STATE MILITARY FORCES AND VETERANS CHAPTER 431. STATE MILITIA SUBTITLE C. Subchapter H. CALLING OF FORCES BY GOVERNOR and
Section 431.073 DRAFT to employ all military and law enforcement necessary to vanquish the invasion of criminals and return the Human Contraband to their homelands. Furthermore, Article I, Sec. 10, last clause of the United State Constitution; says, No State shall ...keep troops ...in time of Peace...or engage in War, Unless actually invaded,. So clearly, the Sovereign State of Texas may use their State Militia and defend its citizens from an invasion of criminals. Signed: Bianca Gracia, President
Latinos for America First Today, April 22, 2021
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28065230/282067572/-2116988518?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210422_FR_OBFOSTER_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2FjNzM4MC1iN2EzLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XBhBfv4LSA-9w0uwkZDihcEzE9BBDTFkAwT1xueDNS4=) After a tough re-election in a battleground district, I’m honored to be representing Nevada’s third district once again and serve my second term in the House of Representatives. I’m about to **[ask for you to chip in $5 to help keep Nevada blue and continue building the movement that demands progress for our state,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28065231/282067573/-2116988518?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210422_FR_OBFOSTER_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2FjNzM4MC1iN2EzLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XBhBfv4LSA-9w0uwkZDihcEzE9BBDTFkAwT1xueDNS4=)** but first I want to tell you why this work is so important to me. I was born in Canton, Ohio. My father was a military veteran who worked at a steel plant and my mother had her hands full raising myself and my seven siblings. _You read that right -- there were 8 of us._ I started working a paper route at the age of eight, and I fondly remember going to swim practice after school everyday because it was the one sport where my mom could drop all of us off at once. I graduated from a public high school and worked my way through college, at times working three and four jobs. I’ll be honest: Growing up in a working family in the middle of Ohio wasn’t dazzling, **but it taught me a lot about how a hard-working family can succeed when we have institutions that uplift everyone -- not just those at the top.** When I moved to Las Vegas as an adult, I knew I wanted to work to improve public education and create more opportunities for children to become involved in sports. I know firsthand how instrumental education and after-school programming are in setting children up for success -- and I made it my mission to make that opportunity more equitable. But after decades of working in the nonprofit sector, I saw how critical public policy is to every level of success for the families and children I was working with. Washington was failing to take action on the issues these folks needed addressed most _\-- and they needed it to happen yesterday._ They need stronger, more equitable public education where your zip code didn’t determine the quality of your school or how much your teachers were paid. They need a livable wage and workers’ rights that allow them to work in a safe environment. They need access to quality health care that won’t force them to choose between going to see a doctor and buying groceries. **So I ran for Congress in the most competitive district in Nevada to fight for hardworking families and with the help of this team, we won.** I’m fighting each and every day to improve the quality of our public education, protect our environment against climate change, and make health care an accessible reality for ALL Americans. And now that Democrats have control of the House, the Senate, AND the White House in 2021, we’re pushing that much further to achieve progress. **Here’s where I need your help:** In order to continue this fight, I need to win re-election in Nevada’s most competitive Congressional district. Nevada was a battleground state for the presidential election, and _Trump campaigned to flip my district the most because he knows he can --**he won it in 2016.**_ National Republicans spent more than $3.5 million attacking me in 2020, and while they weren’t successful in taking back this district -- they closed the margin of victory by SIX POINTS and made NV-03 one of the closest toss-up seats in the nation. That’s why I’m asking for your help -- early money is critical in an incumbent campaign in order to fend off interest from the NRCC and super PACs. [**I want to continue fighting for Nevada families -- who have worked hard but Washington hasn’t worked nearly hard enough for them. So what do you say? Will you chip in $5 to help me defend this battleground district and support a fight that believes EVERYONE deserves a chance?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28065232/282067574/-2116988518?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210422_FR_OBFOSTER_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2FjNzM4MC1iN2EzLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XBhBfv4LSA-9w0uwkZDihcEzE9BBDTFkAwT1xueDNS4=) | | | [Chip in $5 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28065233/282067575/-2116988518?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210422_FR_OBFOSTER_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2FjNzM4MC1iN2EzLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XBhBfv4LSA-9w0uwkZDihcEzE9BBDTFkAwT1xueDNS4=)

body:
Since 1842, the Mississippi Governor's Mansion has served as the primary residence of governors and their families. [](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=0df9fd3ccad74f9588b06447ee9085e6&_e=bqFLjYz-otZI1VCiQZqIwkzeBM5jMvOjH82b7ykmFvqyOaAsnI4xDjJgkmsW6mDchMpDDkEcecu0wGcOKNCkKlb8ET9zm1rM14aI8SWpOQy2HGaNIluHNbglLqpiGpzdjMUQuw-ebZ2_vpuYmmRlag_OTImgOKZdFy5AON3i3Fy389TWfB0ITJX9fXtfVkUJcX1SMchaM2J8xKnRCMVVxgdnt1Er3ab4SDTXDvAGjzV3EdPnXTlIMhIHbTt9p4Szg4thGHPl4tFzTnsbGjLoJhauNMdtTkN2oqOht4yz7QfH-wXrb6mS3zs5L0vUklaYfT6NJyLPU_3XIeRpYjSNwdcHTmSBLpKGKl4u1DAekiDooVY4TeMwnm_mIwy2jnUB) | |
---
Dear Supporter,
Since 1842, the Mississippi Governor’s Mansion has served as the primary residence of governors and their families. It is the second oldest governor’s mansion in active use in the country! In 1975, it was designated as a National Historic Landmark. At that time, it was one of only two state gubernatorial residences to receive this honor.

It has been such a privilege to live in this beautiful home for the past year, and I take seriously my role in maintaining both the mansion’s historical integrity and its natural beauty. Maintaining any home is costly but maintaining one that is nearing its 200th year is full of surprises!

Today, I am reaching out to invite you to become a member of Friends of the Mansion and ask for your financial support to help in this critically important effort. The purpose of the Friends of the Mansion program is to encourage enthusiasm, promote volunteerism, and provide fundraising opportunities to ensure the preservation and beautification of the Mississippi Governor's Mansion. **The Friends of the Mansion annual membership dues are $50.00 per member and include an exclusive invitation to our annual Garden Party on April 27th!**[](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=0df9fd3ccad74f9588b06447ee9085e6&_e=LDGP2FMHZRHXYKmfX0dzKvMvtD3ngvkNaV31haP9aGIBMbyuEf2LVPgTMwnpuHCnu9c33xK_q4RzzpkRFXWroe-Bbdzd8q2QJ9N7LHYdFoTnxpFKbkQpIlsWPzo2j5hXV1y_pOHipnyxHkFZU53ruC0Mp7rS9_w9so6krAb_W2oqPvBwgspqqclXG6XYTwamRY-qwW1VxMZ4nVfabbp4xzfrq_rjyhKpF-Hw6u7tocYY9lFm4XnPdjTD4Sya7Ioz5Gybd__1JcBqfNYuEIKe6pGvxik9RfrDzqtnElj8wM6crTY0bXTM761zTGTqk0xHucs9EJ5fJcBlDB6BblrWICfeqN8X7L27TsCF88trlAcLXMJwPabGaDeXrsYp6hLBBqRuOB8N2y4nBpjiPw5tJT_n4Q_oxUNlAd9eMhK5taqqVEK44JklM623_HNjDAgyuVAYr0TE1UNM9efr7qP-NGhCGczarEG-DlrpjItxhiw%3D)

[](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=0df9fd3ccad74f9588b06447ee9085e6&_e=bqFLjYz-otZI1VCiQZqIwkzeBM5jMvOjH82b7ykmFvqyOaAsnI4xDjJgkmsW6mDchMpDDkEcecu0wGcOKNCkKlb8ET9zm1rM14aI8SWpOQy2HGaNIluHNbglLqpiGpzdjMUQuw-ebZ2_vpuYmmRlag_OTImgOKZdFy5AON3i3Fz8RL3AUFpqy5FxIYjbs57aCgxEyGibUXFUwoz4Fc_y0axBt03H6UlArS6Y_G58fjq97Brd90bnBPaPH-Ey6shgHOHhkbfCGq_XJ1sFRrlqfyCVnPrt4pxNPn3mpc9q8d_laUEPGkyzhLgq-O_LYT7F6rzznlo6RsXQ1LQ770yRqQHhBY0WZB9D5DzuxthVsMI-fN9Y-LGgRsgPJXVToFZf)

The annual Friends of the Mansion Garden Party features a silent auction that recognizes the Mississippi artists who made the 2020 Christmas decorations for the governor’s mansion. Each decoration has a special story, honoring those on the frontlines of the COVID-19 pandemic. We invite you to come hear these stories and learn about how and why each artist created their decoration.

**Please sign up by Saturday, April 24th, if you'd like to join us for our annual garden party on April 27th.**
[_**Join Us!**_](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=0df9fd3ccad74f9588b06447ee9085e6&_e=bqFLjYz-otZI1VCiQZqIwkzeBM5jMvOjH82b7ykmFvqyOaAsnI4xDjJgkmsW6mDchMpDDkEcecu0wGcOKNCkKlb8ET9zm1rM14aI8SWpOQy2HGaNIluHNbglLqpiGpzdjMUQuw-ebZ2_vpuYmmRlag_OTImgOKZdFy5AON3i3FzwRLddzKPVgRCajNF_tMiEmUj49Pd-DqscS4412oJBOokf3QBOnT6-N2APsO6Flg1hkDg5PlQlxCsIbNB7bm-JB5JNS-C4P_xBq6tQPTc7w1wfNrEZOQ9Q8e5dqRPmeGCh6zNU_rytOQeBY7Z0Iy7wUghnd0HyVeFYUosf1uYb-ptMmRTzqu5XYZs2SiF9Nwnh0GMkXfL0bwnY9zuysJDn)
If you can give, we are asking you to please contribute so we can make this year's event extra special! Help us preserve the Mississippi Governor’s Mansion’s historic collection for future generations by donating to the Friends of the Mansion.
