clean_body: Since 1842, the Mississippi Governor's Mansion has served as the primary residence of governors and their families. | | Dear Supporter, Since 1842, the Mississippi Governor’s Mansion has served as the primary residence of governors and their families. It is the second oldest governor’s mansion in active use in the country! In 1975, it was designated as a National Historic Landmark. At that time, it was one of only two state gubernatorial residences to receive this honor. It has been such a privilege to live in this beautiful home for the past year, and I take seriously my role in maintaining both the mansion’s historical integrity and its natural beauty. Maintaining any home is costly but maintaining one that is nearing its 200th year is full of surprises! Today, I am reaching out to invite you to become a member of Friends of the Mansion and ask for your financial support to help in this critically important effort. The purpose of the Friends of the Mansion program is to encourage enthusiasm, promote volunteerism, and provide fundraising opportunities to ensure the preservation and beautification of the Mississippi Governor's Mansion. The Friends of the Mansion annual membership dues are $50.00 per member and include an exclusive invitation to our annual Garden Party on April 27th! The annual Friends of the Mansion Garden Party features a silent auction that recognizes the Mississippi artists who made the 2020 Christmas decorations for the governor’s mansion. Each decoration has a special story, honoring those on the frontlines of the COVID-19 pandemic. We invite you to come hear these stories and learn about how and why each artist created their decoration. Please sign up by Saturday, April 24th, if you'd like to join us for our annual garden party on April 27th. If you can give, we are asking you to please contribute so we can make this year's event extra special! Help us preserve the Mississippi Governor’s Mansion’s historic collection for future generations by donating to the Friends of the Mansion. Remember, donations of $50 or more include a free Friends of the Mansion membership! If you can give, please consider a donation today. Thank you for your support. Sincerely, Elee Reeves First Lady of Mississippi | Paid for by Tate for Governor | | | | ---|---|---|--- Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Tate for Governor P.O. Box 24355, Jackson, MS 39225

name: Bill Olson
subject: God matters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=hh6EfAvEIb8vIic&b=KMFCEUXeeZI.Np6clMkrNA)
---
Hi Peter,

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a Swing district](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=hh6EfAvEIb8vIic&b=KMFCEUXeeZI.Np6clMkrNA) \- Florida’s 9th District, currently held by hard leftist Darren Soto. **

_The First Amendment to the Constitution guarantees Free Exercise of Religion; this not only means freedom to worship as you please without government interference, but it means freedom of conscience._

Democrats forget that a lot these days.

The Governors of New York, New Jersey, California, and several other leftist states have spent the whole COVID emergency trying to attack the freedom of religion of Christians in America.

It makes me sick. These people don't want to recognize our Constitutionally guaranteed freedoms!

Luckily, Trump's appointees on the Supreme Court are standing strong for religious freedom:

_The U.S. Supreme Court in a divided decision late Friday ruled in favor of lifting restrictions on in-home religious gatherings, overturning a lower court ruling that upheld Gov. Gavin Newsom’s limits on people from different homes._

_The 5-4 unsigned ruling follows other similar decisions recently regarding churches and the coronavirus pandemic. The decision noted it was the fifth time the court has rejected the Ninth Circuit’s analysis of California coronavirus restrictions._

_The ruling stated that**before it can limit religious gatherings, the government must prove they pose a greater danger than secular activities** that remain open, such as shopping or attending movies._

While it's good that we have friends on the Supreme Court, we need more to protect our religious liberty. We need a Federal government that is not openly hostile to Christians!

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=hh6EfAvEIb8vIic&b=3XMCAWwpWxItGJXHaXLTrg)
---

The crazy Democrats in Congress passed an act mandating the chemical castration of children as young as four years old, if they demand it, over their parents' objections. _This is crazy stuff, but they are hell bent on weaponizing the Federal government against its own Christian citizens._

**This has to be the end. Until the Democrats prove they accept the Constitution and freedom of religion, they can never be trusted with the majority in Congress again.**

_I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Democrat. With a little more help, we can do this!_

Darren Soto voted for all of the bad Pelosi-Schumer legislation, including the anti-Christian bills that violate the Constitution. He's gone off the deep end, and I can beat him!

**I am an America First patriot, I am a Christian, and I will vote with the Constitution, every time. I spent my life defending it, and I will do so in Congress!**

If you value religious freedom, I need your help. Can[ you help me?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=hh6EfAvEIb8vIic&b=KMFCEUXeeZI.Np6clMkrNA)

[Can I count on you for a donation](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=hh6EfAvEIb8vIic&b=KMFCEUXeeZI.Np6clMkrNA) of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2900 per individual, $5800 per couple?

**All the crazy extremist bills show us what is needed- we need control of Congress. I can help deliver that **- [with your help!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=hh6EfAvEIb8vIic&b=KMFCEUXeeZI.Np6clMkrNA)

_Let's get this done!_
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=hh6EfAvEIb8vIic&b=KMFCEUXeeZI.Np6clMkrNA)
---
Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter

P.S. [I really need your help today](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=hh6EfAvEIb8vIic&b=KMFCEUXeeZI.Np6clMkrNA), so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP! ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=hh6EfAvEIb8vIic&b=KMFCEUXeeZI.Np6clMkrNA)Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

Marlton NJ 08053
USA

Arkansas law limits contributions to $5,600 per election cycle. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600.
Corporate contributions are not permissible.
Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law.
State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

body:
With your help, we funded back up childcare for three of our candidates. We have to keep up the good work. Hi Peter, Here is the thing. Political organizations are quick to spend their fundraising dollars on negative advertisements, but many don't think outside of the box to offer the kind support to women candidates that would truly make a difference for their campaign. **Here is how we are changing the game. ** For the first time ever, Moms in Office established a Childcare Fund. This will allow us to pay for a portion of our endorsed candidates' childcare expenses while they are campaigning. Candidates can use some of their hard-earned campaign contributions for childcare, but this puts women at a disadvantage if they are running against a male incumbent without caregiving responsibilities. **[Our fundraising dollars don't pay for attack ads--they pay for caregiving and we need you to help us keep going by funding another 50 hours of care. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I could really use your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
In just a second, I'm going to ask you to chip in to our campaign. But before I do, I'd like to update you on where things stand in our race, and why we need your help right now.
The minute I announced my campaign, I knew it would be a tough fight ahead. Dark money and Republican special interest groups poured millions of dollars into New Hampshire in 2016 to try and beat me -- and they almost succeeded. **When the dust settled, I won by just 1,017 votes.**
Now, with Democrats holding a razor-thin Senate majority, Republicans are doing whatever they can to win this seat. The Koch network and Mitch McConnell's super PAC are already spending big on attack ads in New Hampshire, and election experts are saying this seat is one of the most likely to flip to the GOP.
My team told me that we're falling behind on our April fundraising goal. [**To close the gap, we 've set a grassroots fundraising goal of $25,000 before midnight on Sunday. Can you please chip in $3 today to keep the Senate blue and defend our progress?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8c6/2a380d31/267b59bb/f0702c/1412558693/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDQyMl9nb2FsX1JPIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210422_goal_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

clean_body: Hello, In just a second, I'm going to ask you to chip in to our campaign. But before I do, I'd like to update you on where things stand in our race, and why we need your help right now. The minute I announced my campaign, I knew it would be a tough fight ahead. Dark money and Republican special interest groups poured millions of dollars into New Hampshire in 2016 to try and beat me -- and they almost succeeded. When the dust settled, I won by just 1,017 votes. Now, with Democrats holding a razor-thin Senate majority, Republicans are doing whatever they can to win this seat. The Koch network and Mitch McConnell's super PAC are already spending big on attack ads in New Hampshire, and election experts are saying this seat is one of the most likely to flip to the GOP. My team told me that we're falling behind on our April fundraising goal. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" I truly believe that together we can make a difference. That's why I first ran for office -- to advocate for families and kids who weren't getting the support they needed. And that's the spirit I'm asking you to embrace today by standing with me ahead of our crucial deadline. I could really use your help today, everyone. Every deadline is a test of our momentum, and I'm worried about what might happen if we fall short. "" Thank you for your support. I mean it when I say we can't do this without you. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan ""

| [](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=bf469c651dc94ed4a082328376a341ad&_e=mCWayYlrkDRtlVUWayM--XRDh6gOqJWdpAcX7fwdm-_wHQrCGHu1YJgL4Zcs3WpVfBuUcHG9RtJ_aQwdDpFdA79UElQuk0fVxisE_kgT2CNlWcY0JK88jCWpDasuGmY2Adtii3Es58WLrkQTL93JwuiQzsb09NGU_9LnDG78qlF8pXq_t5yAgdZPt7-xoQhyTDuQmoCaLBNJ39tek-57-HrCqrRqyenWEtHUB7dlEgktJ0Juhhh6IOXbNnaqwGmp_PCUQY7rlfS4qdt8jQtS6HY_VunjcUhyBQ8T4XJX6YDXsUZu20liI9DGkbMjbW1umo2KBE_cXr4Ocgo6nxlsAALLJ1TAzKyuBxGgnrfZML7uKY0kFX1fnkaQ8gCo4pEhRoP9U1j1oOMwoA0F84ocMzCPKQa0LklhbQPnx6v2XET1GNG0MrIdYMA8ltxFEEFAOxt4R-LU_YN3uih9233HtgvvfK5VxkkO7-qyYg-2IwihaZvqzIZxZCr2W4_wJXbxsxpir87Ku-wlK7mq0glpnw%3D%3D)

Friend,

The supposedly “moderate” Democrats who promised to “reach across the aisle” and work in a “bipartisan” manner are shutting down debate, introducing measures that exert unrelenting government control over private business, extending the federal government’s reach further into our wallets, and **gradually introducing their socialist ideology into our everyday lives in the dead of night.** | [**REJECT THE SOCIALIST IDEOLOGY**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=bf469c651dc94ed4a082328376a341ad&_e=mCWayYlrkDRtlVUWayM--XRDh6gOqJWdpAcX7fwdm-_wHQrCGHu1YJgL4Zcs3WpVfBuUcHG9RtJ_aQwdDpFdA79UElQuk0fVxisE_kgT2CNlWcY0JK88jCWpDasuGmY2Adtii3Es58WLrkQTL93JwuiQzsb09NGU_9LnDG78qlF8pXq_t5yAgdZPt7-xoQhyTDuQmoCaLBNJ39tek-57-HrCqrRqyenWEtHUB7dlEgktJ0Juhhh6IOXbNnaqwGmp_PCUQY7rlfS4qdt8jQtS6HY_VunjcUhyBQ8T4XJX6YDXsUZu20liI9DGkbMjbW1ukxH9TyFiv3U1t7EzzURt2TGZOwKjjGCAr_R-yK1myNqe-vr9sNuh40wsWqKIbg10h9emJp3G0XD7D2BU8d9kNN72l4FErkGgzxZEyuI8DatcpLshYDS96Ew6X6ffG77tIkUnKneYgysgQR-2sLnMoy496FEqXQl571ZhAjot3cVhN2Zo1em3ig1gtJb1f6R85Kexd2WmeRiQZRDH8qSldQ%3D%3D)
---

Although radical, these policies pale in comparison to their latest push: **packing the U.S. Supreme Court.**

**The American people elected me to uphold the freedoms we love and sound the alarm on dangerous policies that may come to pass.**

**[THAT'S EXACTLY WHAT I'M DOING.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=bf469c651dc94ed4a082328376a341ad&_e=mCWayYlrkDRtlVUWayM--XRDh6gOqJWdpAcX7fwdm-_wHQrCGHu1YJgL4Zcs3WpVfBuUcHG9RtJ_aQwdDpFdA79UElQuk0fVxisE_kgT2CNlWcY0JK88jCWpDasuGmY2Adtii3Es58WLrkQTL93JwuiQzsb09NGU_9LnDG78qlF8pXq_t5yAgdZPt7-xoQhyTDuQmoCaLBNJ39tek-57-HrCqrRqyenWEtHUB7dlEgktJ0Juhhh6IOXbNnaqwGmp_PCUQY7rlfS4qdt8jQtS6HY_VunjcUhyBQ8T4XJX6YDXsUZu20liI9DGkbMjbW1ujJ9HqK2Bw0D6r1_Umh1aAQWc19r6uD0KaXq5LKnmPZwul-ZtWv0TgC_YwLqEEfJIa9JwFG1dSjYr_14Ng_f0EQ5gGmCVoPlg0lMeLLT6CaojM9GtnpwI9G3c61bzAybA2gcpKpxWM99vaLSfVDBPK3inSFCglyrvzedbFg-WqIIg6rY-R6b-CYW2Is7jwJQrQwHaKTGpBQ4vnMxDXIY80g%3D%3D)**

Look no further than Venezuela. Once a wealthy and prosperous regional power, the South American country is now on the brink of complete and total destruction due to the socialist and authoritarian policies of Hugo Chavez and Nicolas Maduro.

**It started with changing Venezuela’s court from 20 to 32 judges who upheld Chavez radical policies.**

Proposals made in socialist or communist regimes have no place in America, but today it’s as if some in Congress are looking at Maduro as a role model. [**We cannot allow radical ideologues to transform our courts in desperate attempts to serve their political agenda.**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=bf469c651dc94ed4a082328376a341ad&_e=mCWayYlrkDRtlVUWayM--XRDh6gOqJWdpAcX7fwdm-_wHQrCGHu1YJgL4Zcs3WpVfBuUcHG9RtJ_aQwdDpFdA79UElQuk0fVxisE_kgT2CNlWcY0JK88jCWpDasuGmY2Adtii3Es58WLrkQTL93JwuiQzsb09NGU_9LnDG78qlF8pXq_t5yAgdZPt7-xoQhyTDuQmoCaLBNJ39tek-57-HrCqrRqyenWEtHUB7dlEgktJ0Juhhh6IOXbNnaqwGmp_PCUQY7rlfS4qdt8jQtS6HY_VunjcUhyBQ8T4XJX6YDXsUZu20liI9DGkbMjbW1uVIIqWmWFeNkiSeGiad_aUa4IFBAeyUolwMtQE9tPYKGmfIKLihLubM6tQPTrt2Pd6B2BXkZP-FK6BAkPnH0jNP6Nwz-1o9YBim9CrcvAaG4CBwcpEwaacMRGel1VVPk1gIJCVLqrv9ZcbNhzMf3LQ4ytYdFc2XzBxkFvjRrRp434vCz48CZdAaBvmESp36EL-0zD_dS9GUAoRdv_P1QcAg%3D%3D)
[**STOP RADICAL IDEOLOGUES FROM TRANSFORMING OUR COURTS**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=bf469c651dc94ed4a082328376a341ad&_e=mCWayYlrkDRtlVUWayM--XRDh6gOqJWdpAcX7fwdm-_wHQrCGHu1YJgL4Zcs3WpVfBuUcHG9RtJ_aQwdDpFdA79UElQuk0fVxisE_kgT2CNlWcY0JK88jCWpDasuGmY2Adtii3Es58WLrkQTL93JwuiQzsb09NGU_9LnDG78qlF8pXq_t5yAgdZPt7-xoQhyTDuQmoCaLBNJ39tek-57-HrCqrRqyenWEtHUB7dlEgktJ0Juhhh6IOXbNnaqwGmp_PCUQY7rlfS4qdt8jQtS6HY_VunjcUhyBQ8T4XJX6YDXsUZu20liI9DGkbMjbW1uJ7PZHNdI6jDdGMg-KFWX6R9ojEZQvQK2C_GKeoo47zn53-FA9c9OSliTzs7CLMDlEv1VqM1ekQktHT7VS-B3ZflO07EBW4TJbpcIZ9MAzQr-3A9PByiMpLlPSeg_cBi19Qlam-GjkX4at2FNe75bbzQUSP7MrBRC2byW-NzJQxJq9kPf-uDG5keJZMXxES0V4F1U0FGvU5yzTG1ZCf1KKg%3D%3D)

In the end, we came up short by 13,000 signatures.

**[We’re still looking for the additional 13,000 signatures and we’ve set a goal of finding them by the time President Biden gives his State of the Union address on Wednesday, April 28th.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b08daeed9bce41d987879045f8cc04b4&_e=dhFEQKRV7aJFvau2em23nXCaIWzwotEfqlBUIRw5gDnKzizrWJLj2lKiB7zH8dPorr-79H4a3a5pxL2Qc6Vtg0YsHJ77S6c1OBYAYdqHKDW6OXLUNpYDP5Bmbf08sAnOMMEM2KpETMHxSXTdLAvyXm788cJzfh_UcWY1hOKQO-YRC2JAELKacFnOo8XW7BWqYvFlrMa_t-VIOfaqAfzM-ptYGY8_z3gIx0qSatd48A7P5UoMlNeujj-wPavR4xwZ_C14fiAZgpe71KG6VawYfGcsC3e_GYsdVBdJai_MNQyCo5cZrSblldoNpNNDtLfIM_nX-8MYpOoE9lLlrZwWHBPun20sLMpfsZ5h4HXJuxYNxV4bTr-jwlTzxLWHZF6gBzK4FK6IzW4LYoGAQ7N8HQsLpWUHthbdvncmMxdFUU0zr91i7SkyAL9my2EPHyhwddkKybkuOrrwiYI6QSjgP3t51_L2jMJJpOYmxcW3c7A%3D)**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b08daeed9bce41d987879045f8cc04b4&_e=dhFEQKRV7aJFvau2em23nXCaIWzwotEfqlBUIRw5gDnKzizrWJLj2lKiB7zH8dPorr-79H4a3a5pxL2Qc6Vtg0YsHJ77S6c1OBYAYdqHKDW6OXLUNpYDP5Bmbf08sAnOMMEM2KpETMHxSXTdLAvyXm788cJzfh_UcWY1hOKQO-YRC2JAELKacFnOo8XW7BWqYvFlrMa_t-VIOfaqAfzM-ptYGY8_z3gIx0qSatd48A7P5UoMlNeujj-wPavR4xwZ_C14fiAZgpe71KG6VawYfArcasl7wDZb4izDR0GgfB1oNJb4MQRyFMXTmtL93kSkGzKFVXasBk6BuHXvt9_uwoXA3n84fHFCbstJvSAo8tkYqcXI5g1JKf9ujf8SilIjsgLn7e4aFr-r8AP5xOM240fYaXwURfspmDYxW9I90THBkE0vxsrFc7r_sq-6ZUwirgTtaSkDy2UPTaVWPYDZ93dza04hU-_Jy5R3MbgaVtg%3D)
Fellow American,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden and Democrats in Congress are of the mindset that forcing through legislation on party-line votes is the way to go.

That just doesn’t fly. In Congress, our mandate from the American people is simple: Don’t do anything dumb. Democrats haven’t gotten the memo.

**Democrats have the narrowest congressional majority in the last 50 years, yet they’re acting as if they have a supermajority**.

Clearly Pelosi, Schumer, and Biden don’t remember what happened in 2010 after they went rogue and passed Obamacare without a single Republican vote. Need a reminder? **Republicans picked up 63 seats in the House and flipped the majority.**

Democrats are at it once again. They’ve added more than $2 trillion to our national debt in just two months and they’re eyeing an additional $3 trillion in spending in the coming months - with zero plans to negotiate with Republicans.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b08daeed9bce41d987879045f8cc04b4&_e=dhFEQKRV7aJFvau2em23nXCaIWzwotEfqlBUIRw5gDnKzizrWJLj2lKiB7zH8dPorr-79H4a3a5pxL2Qc6Vtg0YsHJ77S6c1OBYAYdqHKDW6OXLUNpYDP5Bmbf08sAnOMMEM2KpETMHxSXTdLAvyXm788cJzfh_UcWY1hOKQO-YRC2JAELKacFnOo8XW7BWqYvFlrMa_t-VIOfaqAfzM-ptYGY8_z3gIx0qSatd48A7P5UoMlNeujj-wPavR4xwZ_C14fiAZgpe71KG6VawYfMjm-l-_JwAGsrKNeZjxFMltgwi4St3yhJ4kjnXPY0YKGxt-LI6H1lCe53hQh49krhojafxxNGpeYxux6iFvHljqRHD3b9v9F3ObnFJze9eNVQN228ayX_7TyiN7UZoA9gCP5tg_I6Uv6stW17Vje0BpUVNWwNeOWgfSGUGZ4_CIN5WnawUlhNN0Dpzn-bPrvFR49cohIdTTRu_Vce47n6M%3D)
That’s a mistake.

I’m writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need a few more Conservatives in the House to put the Democrats in the minority and prevent the Biden administration from doing more damage to our nation](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b08daeed9bce41d987879045f8cc04b4&_e=dhFEQKRV7aJFvau2em23nXCaIWzwotEfqlBUIRw5gDnKzizrWJLj2lKiB7zH8dPorr-79H4a3a5pxL2Qc6Vtg0YsHJ77S6c1OBYAYdqHKDW6OXLUNpYDP5Bmbf08sAnOMMEM2KpETMHxSXTdLAvyXm788cJzfh_UcWY1hOKQO-YRC2JAELKacFnOo8XW7BWqYvFlrMa_t-VIOfaqAfzM-ptYGY8_z3gIx0qSatd48A7P5UoMlNeujj-wPavR4xwZ_C14fiAZgpe71KG6VawYfN4dgU32uI7rc7oE0CO-0oF6iwt_lgMf3r2egdLJqqJI0JRBfrKEYkvC0i3NjNKe7TRgjuMO4CX3lMsHazScWCJ-KPOla2NmnscomZ0EQ7NSNXBAkrib4usjuFkhYpCUr5fCQSgIf-cIUh451qu-eWMP0-nx_DhpEhimuQksTdKdpQJsj58Fov97kOXbgmjm3asylwzOa2vTHkKsccg4_cU%3D)**.

While the election may not be this month or even this year – **we must begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY**.

A couple of months ago we sent around a petition calling for **[100,000 conservatives to join our “2022 comeback team”](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b08daeed9bce41d987879045f8cc04b4&_e=dhFEQKRV7aJFvau2em23nXCaIWzwotEfqlBUIRw5gDnKzizrWJLj2lKiB7zH8dPorr-79H4a3a5pxL2Qc6Vtg0YsHJ77S6c1OBYAYdqHKDW6OXLUNpYDP5Bmbf08sAnOMMEM2KpETMHxSXTdLAvyXm788cJzfh_UcWY1hOKQO-YRC2JAELKacFnOo8XW7BWqYvFlrMa_t-VIOfaqAfzM-ptYGY8_z3gIx0qSatd48A7P5UoMlNeujj-wPavR4xwZ_C14fiAZgpe71KG6VawYfNltxaY8ji88RgzMBKDuoKeqMmNHlxXQ6otOZeXyzwHEH3rr84v39vsAMFOZAV-eT91cOgHJtiil1nFz7J5Ffb-4kRtVw4JJyNap3EcoilzhN5wUo5r3FvWxfRBsHxABQRFjPehdeFsNztdXOsIXMrE2UBOCgwS3IagPGo7AJebDPCmRe6kxY05MFDtJLYu-M4nEOZheoruZBMgM0ADe6mU%3D)** in an effort to ensure we have the right people in place to take back Congress next November. In the end, we came up short by 13,000 signatures.

We’re still looking for the additional 13,000 signatures and **we’ve set a goal of finding them by the time President Biden gives his State of the Union address on Wednesday, April 28th**.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b08daeed9bce41d987879045f8cc04b4&_e=dhFEQKRV7aJFvau2em23nXCaIWzwotEfqlBUIRw5gDnKzizrWJLj2lKiB7zH8dPorr-79H4a3a5pxL2Qc6Vtg0YsHJ77S6c1OBYAYdqHKDW6OXLUNpYDP5Bmbf08sAnOMMEM2KpETMHxSXTdLAvyXm788cJzfh_UcWY1hOKQO-YRC2JAELKacFnOo8XW7BWqYvFlrMa_t-VIOfaqAfzM-ptYGY8_z3gIx0qSatd48A7P5UoMlNeujj-wPavR4xwZ_C14fiAZgpe71KG6VawYfLdsiyofuQloRsJy5FXi5dU7QM_1hyIsAFDgIbWpOqvjrfbuO_kLlAgruSbrJ2GqdN_ewZs9JTTh65wiRZKQllcH7kUhTeXoR3ampnItHtBPb6r-BipIyKXbbiIXL3qMalslOuowsMrf0yrzsNUEnsHvmuRN87C9bJLEFhgYHNNocR1R5IG0b8Rn5hbklnvGUiES5MBONPsNCRRGBjjQc5A%3D)

Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. **[We’re counting on you to join our cause.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b08daeed9bce41d987879045f8cc04b4&_e=dhFEQKRV7aJFvau2em23nXCaIWzwotEfqlBUIRw5gDnKzizrWJLj2lKiB7zH8dPorr-79H4a3a5pxL2Qc6Vtg0YsHJ77S6c1OBYAYdqHKDW6OXLUNpYDP5Bmbf08sAnOMMEM2KpETMHxSXTdLAvyXm788cJzfh_UcWY1hOKQO-YRC2JAELKacFnOo8XW7BWqYvFlrMa_t-VIOfaqAfzM-ptYGY8_z3gIx0qSatd48A7P5UoMlNeujj-wPavR4xwZ_C14fiAZgpe71KG6VawYfDPzMDnD6wmSns4lM3Tng0sAW1cXcqsfoCl2ZKrXDKBEoV0hpm0xlxU_oPcAA7ercuv8RXOB76w5ZJzNaRQzz3B_VZjj3dAWdoRtCd9Uvo3rQeoolE1cRUZO-FYsw9iO_KADm1P2FYdVZqzq_wfusFDbK1GAM8NsZe7PDn4iey654kZz_iv9RRpUM3jBEkCx7OQjxSrm5tw1aWYDQXrDFR4%3D)**

Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can’t block Democrats’ pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline.

The American people made it clear in November’s election – they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. **[Now we must expand the map and take back the majority](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b08daeed9bce41d987879045f8cc04b4&_e=dhFEQKRV7aJFvau2em23nXCaIWzwotEfqlBUIRw5gDnKzizrWJLj2lKiB7zH8dPorr-79H4a3a5pxL2Qc6Vtg0YsHJ77S6c1OBYAYdqHKDW6OXLUNpYDP5Bmbf08sAnOMMEM2KpETMHxSXTdLAvyXm788cJzfh_UcWY1hOKQO-YRC2JAELKacFnOo8XW7BWqYvFlrMa_t-VIOfaqAfzM-ptYGY8_z3gIx0qSatd48A7P5UoMlNeujj-wPavR4xwZ_C14fiAZgpe71KG6VawYfFAY1pbzXF_zGdgSrPaE34PVpEiLIGIbnyB1wjIBygQBmFgfTmtW5VRjCZoRTqiN1o4xTeXHs6Xga-yEIIJxR0rkAQnS1vCjiNbVOCs8QE62g4UyPJfOV7NJqYOPHgjUHZywmTx2BBjyeazz2ij0duzhfMWKzVEuTMt69fX09FXFByJx2pmfIq_u1IPs08iUkZl9GVhbEckZZ19cVMe18F4%3D)**.

We hope you will be among the first to sign up and signal your commitment to return a Conservative majority in the House.

Thank you for your support.

For freedom,

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b08daeed9bce41d987879045f8cc04b4&_e=dhFEQKRV7aJFvau2em23nXCaIWzwotEfqlBUIRw5gDnKzizrWJLj2lKiB7zH8dPorr-79H4a3a5pxL2Qc6Vtg0YsHJ77S6c1OBYAYdqHKDW6OXLUNpYDP5Bmbf08sAnOMMEM2KpETMHxSXTdLAvyXm788cJzfh_UcWY1hOKQO-YRC2JAELKacFnOo8XW7BWqYvFlrMa_t-VIOfaqAfzM-ptYGY8_z3gIx0qSatd48A7P5UoMlNeujj-wPavR4xwZ_C14fiAZgpe71KG6VawYfKLe7xwzff3zT0d1b4r4sXVxRGfSYlt8IM1FwT-HQ3tgYYw6wWkTq1hhH_9-olJLjT-DhKyBe73QruEsPknDL9Mii-jCXnySKFn0cskHBe5-JXScUyDnzxTqkrLqiB7Jmq8BS7VkFWF2aSTEZQ2xDSBM69aA8LLX17rxxSWitsciGRIW1Z1XGlL3bVN3iO15t9w4sTJwnNrdDZjwa2mB6U7gKnlsXug1IU393eLsxxVT)
Jim Jordan

body:
On Earth Day, I wanted to take a moment to renew my commitment to protecting the Earth.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28070464/282092714/1954307125?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210422-1-EM&amount=25&header=Donate to Susan Wild!&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzNmZGZkZi1jY2EzLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPLiYdKzVgl97BZ2kyS6Bqrdmz684fFB1BH4UKDOWss=)
---
| Peter,

Happy Earth Day!

I have always been committed to fighting climate change year round. But on Earth Day, I wanted to take a moment to renew my commitment to protecting the Earth.

My commitment to climate activism goes back to high school, when I joined the “Clean Earth Club.” Since then, I’ve been an organic gardener, beekeeper, and an early user of hybrid vehicles.

When I got to Congress, I knew I had a chance to make a difference for our environment. That’s why I signed on to be co-chair of the Climate Change Task Force. And I’m proud that I earned a 96% lifetime score from the League of Conservation Voters.

You don’t need to be a Member of Congress to make a difference. Whether you’re driving a hybrid or electric vehicle, using renewable grocery bags and water bottles or recycling and composting, your small actions can have a big impact.

_**[Will you take a moment today to pledge to take action and help protect the environment this year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28070465/282092715/-937745299?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzNmZGZkZi1jY2EzLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPLiYdKzVgl97BZ2kyS6Bqrdmz684fFB1BH4UKDOWss=&emci=43ba71ea-b8a3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=ac3fdfdf-cca3-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=5543981)**_

clean_body: On Earth Day, I wanted to take a moment to renew my commitment to protecting the Earth. | to Susan Wild!&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzNmZGZkZi1jY2EzLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPLiYdKzVgl97BZ2kyS6Bqrdmz684fFB1BH4UKDOWss= | Peter, Happy Earth Day! I have always been committed to fighting climate change year round. But on Earth Day, I wanted to take a moment to renew my commitment to protecting the Earth. My commitment to climate activism goes back to high school, when I joined the “Clean Earth Club.” Since then, I’ve been an organic gardener, beekeeper, and an early user of hybrid vehicles. When I got to Congress, I knew I had a chance to make a difference for our environment. That’s why I signed on to be co-chair of the Climate Change Task Force. And I’m proud that I earned a 96% lifetime score from the League of Conservation Voters. You don’t need to be a Member of Congress to make a difference. Whether you’re driving a hybrid or electric vehicle, using renewable grocery bags and water bottles or recycling and composting, your small actions can have a big impact. | Thank you for committing to a greener future. Susan Wild | | to Susan Wild!&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzNmZGZkZi1jY2EzLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPLiYdKzVgl97BZ2kyS6Bqrdmz684fFB1BH4UKDOWss= Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States Susan Wild represents Pennsylvania's 7th District in Congress. She believes we can grow overall economic prosperity while still caring for the vulnerable members of our community. And she knows, now more than ever, it's working-class families that deserve a break in this economy — not big city billionaires and wealthy corporations. But she needs your support today -- her campaign runs on grassroots donations since she's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. to Susan Wild!&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzNmZGZkZi1jY2EzLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPLiYdKzVgl97BZ2kyS6Bqrdmz684fFB1BH4UKDOWss= | to Susan Wild!&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzNmZGZkZi1jY2EzLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPLiYdKzVgl97BZ2kyS6Bqrdmz684fFB1BH4UKDOWss= If you would like to receive fewer emails, **. name: Mo Brooks for Senate
subject: We're Off To A Great Start!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
Mo Brooks is a proven conservative that will be a fearless fighter in the Senate.
| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.
---
[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=monthly_newsletter&n=1)
---

|
# **We're Off To A Great Start!**
_“Ladies and Gentlemen, the next United States Senator from the Great State of Alabama! Mo Brooks!”_ The people of Alabama and supporters like you all over the country have heard this message! **This campaign is off to a great start!** Here are the highlights of our first month: On March 22nd, we kicked off the campaign at _Bullet and Barrel Indoor Shooting Range and Training_ _Facility_ in Huntsville (Yes, Mo supports the 2nd Amendment) attended by a **crowd of over 300** people with **President Trump’s Special Advisor Stephen Miller** , where he gave Mo his endorsement. [Check out the ](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRYVpZKNcHTh9g1B-XQ2WBLm&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=monthly_newsletter&n=2)[video by clicking here.](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRYVpZKNcHTh9g1B-XQ2WBLm&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=monthly_newsletter&n=3) We have **thousands of new friends and supporters on Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter**! Many of you are part of a**growing number of financial supporters** who are sending a clear message that you agree that we need Mo Brooks in the U.S. Senate. Thanks for your support, and **if you haven’t yet given, you can do so[here](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RnBTScW388vli_szuCqErsQxh8_Hxrn6IlYVhEUvGqIDKY7mdZ2_Nci5-Q2Y9ZZTD-nfxEgxnA9d7CZ_cDC_UoA&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=monthly_newsletter&n=4)****.** Since the kickoff, Mo received additional endorsements from groups like the **Senate Conservatives Fund** , the **Americans For Legal Immigration PAC** , and **Congressman Barry Moore.** For any campaign, this would be a great start, but it gets even better! On April 7, **President Donald J. Trump gave Mo his “Complete and total Endorsement for the U.S. Senate representing the Great State of Alabama****. ”** President Trump went on to say, _“He will never let you down! Few Republicans have as much COURAGE and FIGHT as Alabama Congressman Mo Brooks. Mo is a great Conservative Republican leader, who will stand up for America First no matter what obstacles the Fake News Media, RINOs, or Socialist Democrats may place in his path. Mo Brooks is pro-life, loves our Military and our Vets, will protect our Second Amendment, combat the Biden open borders agenda, is fighting for voter integrity (like few others).”_ Thank you, President Trump! Yes, it has been a fantastic start! Election Day is a long way off, but **we need your help today**. Please go to the website www.mobrooks.com to sign up to help in our campaign. Spread the word about Mo on social media and tell your friends and family why you support Mo. Be on the lookout for future updates. We look forward to sharing more good news and special events in the coming months, including a Mo Brooks Boat Parade and much more. The Mo Brooks For Senate Campaign
---

---

---

Mo Brooks for Senate Committee

body:
It's time to make it clear to Joe Biden where We the People stand: [](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=dd8dcb2f583149c3af80582045936af2&_e=Vcb3-3-FcUYaOjIUMy5LJxyojMI-q5oyxY5lJMqyGz2sUVBYB-JFsJOdItjZMacg1EAdcJzxf5DdDpN0lsqsiN9pf4P42bhqWrCwfbGLjiLT2SEYAfixQ1nWT6ak70P0Mw68c2DtVrMivTIvdphhpc4DwDe9jZblV2AhVPrxEw031j8qVtGH-zGaD3XdxLyRtfNrJuUUe1h9b_t9Oehc-DOaRRTAzjFl5qpmzDs820UZQVkMQk6mGRmRb0KwRaAaeVu2NR5xoK5lPctuDH6-TFoU3tP3D9amEkR0ud_at0fnw4xzDPEY31zb3ke00Pp0c55OWN0JViYwOE1-EizEQMu80pG1dPSWnXseGzOeadwchhcRLIzD3j9fciu8bI2Bgrj8frURkZw10fcSheynxCY72CSENT8SlY9xOrxpdpqNKbDh_IE3mI2tfPECvLj8) | |

Fellow Mississippian,
It’s time to make it clear to Joe Biden where **We the People** stand:

**We believe in the Second Amendment** and all of the principles laid out in the Constitution.

**We believe in life** , **law and order** , **and** the fact that a nation cannot exist without its **borders**.

Most importantly, **we believe in unity** , because working together to achieve a goal is the best way to do what’s best for our state and nation. This is why we want true American Patriots like _**YOU**_ to become an official member of the Mississippi GOP.
[**_Join us!_**](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=dd8dcb2f583149c3af80582045936af2&_e=Vcb3-3-FcUYaOjIUMy5LJxyojMI-q5oyxY5lJMqyGz2sUVBYB-JFsJOdItjZMacg1EAdcJzxf5DdDpN0lsqsiN9pf4P42bhqWrCwfbGLjiLT2SEYAfixQ1nWT6ak70P0Mw68c2DtVrMivTIvdphhpc4DwDe9jZblV2AhVPrxEw031j8qVtGH-zGaD3XdxLyRtfNrJuUUe1h9b_t9Oehc-Bj-_3cpEFerxFqPyiXL85pqAiABb_05dqyTfAG_RPKFML3WCtvcxhdbi-DQsONb744ZlaFsHhxUvVvkm4a1SLFKCEa37VD_qbhjqZ7wdHtEMqo9cSCvXL2LDJMcHYANMTJsgaSt5ZY08wft6Peagg67TWRwUTpZk39VU2N9vQt8C7gU0oJtHpNFAH7G4bVdxjkmX0794JLsULJHgdfL6Kx8liaZTF1aRekP8Mmcg_e7)
**For only $10, YOU can become an Official Member of the Mississippi Republican Party and fight alongside our team to preserve American freedom here, on the last stand on Earth, for future generations.**

**_Get your Official member card below!_**
[](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=dd8dcb2f583149c3af80582045936af2&_e=Vcb3-3-FcUYaOjIUMy5LJxyojMI-q5oyxY5lJMqyGz2sUVBYB-JFsJOdItjZMacg1EAdcJzxf5DdDpN0lsqsiN9pf4P42bhqWrCwfbGLjiLT2SEYAfixQ1nWT6ak70P0Mw68c2DtVrMivTIvdphhpc4DwDe9jZblV2AhVPrxEw031j8qVtGH-zGaD3XdxLyRtfNrJuUUe1h9b_t9Oehc-E1fmKkqw9NhVfGGUOa5rGXYrEH0qdxqjtj09oTDc3r6F10etxtwE_Hi1YBbHJclUVSzXhS7sHRnTnIOep1EAsVEkjNJo90bWBunTLQTGHs0c-RhyeH0oN4ecbRbDha9Ipx7bjskHhvPfToD2TNb_fkTTbxUMhsgzuFR16Gu63s0gvngmJ5cxh6NXYPT7ntQ1Xeijkb9FPmwpFh9jc_KPUvZ-Nm0Frl5OACSUr6VnMAA)
_We need your help if we’re going to send a clear message to Joe Biden telling him to stop undermining our Conservative Values._

**Please add your name by donating below, and join our team of fellow Republicans in opposing the Radical Left.**

We need you in our corner! _**Are you in?**_
[**Add Your Name _HERE_**](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=dd8dcb2f583149c3af80582045936af2&_e=Vcb3-3-FcUYaOjIUMy5LJxyojMI-q5oyxY5lJMqyGz2sUVBYB-JFsJOdItjZMacgiuL8hK8hbltvpdK6ZCKWE9WMf8p3TfBQgvxCPMFTuCLM4jPKSFYAY5kKn32l_3lfNGEx2c0mbp52QszL4SJlOizfNWrRGGlhTTrbEv3lvTlTKN3x1s5XSKA3EyMRx_AFkrJhJ6mIlJGBUjioqzUprCQwZgBePAyyOzHjLDv5hvgemTJamGe0QVDr9m0tM3Q2xVzsYombcGia0nzl1X5w0P7D5IUJA7ReMyXZAHSaPrXkTBu3M7zVBLxUgdJVQj9gDDO8IA7JWVK69-Ily-Mw2qWswp1f-5cvgoK8QhJeNVusSB1ZaiyTGaVN-wlzNtCPdn9CHOj2I4Z2wrsdkIcl9A%3D%3D)
Thank for your continued support.
Thank you,
Frank Bordeaux
Chairman, Mississippi Republican Party

name: Jim Banks, Chairman
subject: Should the Left pack the court?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HOUSE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND
body:
Fellow Conservative, The Radical Left is trying to do everything in their power to pack the court to pass through their increasingly far-Left agenda before the rest of the country is able to stop them! **If we don’t stop them, the courts will be packed and the Left’s Socialist agenda will go on unchecked!**
* Higher taxes
* Open borders
* Abolishing the electoral college
* And so much more...

The Supreme Court with the 3 justices President Trump added is the final bulwark against the Democrat controlled House, Senate and White House.
